title: NASA Awards More Moon Base Science, Previews New Opportunities
description: NASA announced Tuesday the selection of three companies to land four new missions on the Moon in late 2028 as part of the agency’s Moon Base Program. Astrobotic, Firefly Aerospace, and Intuitive Machines will deliver NASA science payloads to the lunar surface as the agency builds the first outpost on another celestial world. “These new […]
content:
Three artist renderings depict commercial lunar landers from Astrobotic, Intuitive Machines, and Firefly on the Moon. NASA announced June 30 the landers will deliver more NASA science investigations and technology demonstrations to the lunar surface for NASA’s Moon Base Program.Credit: Astrobotic/Intuitive Machines/Firefly


NASA announced Tuesday the selection of three companies to land four new missions on the Moon in late 2028 as part of the agency’s Moon Base Program. Astrobotic, Firefly Aerospace, and Intuitive Machines will deliver NASA science payloads to the lunar surface as the agency builds the first outpost on another celestial world.



“These new awards to our commercial partners, totaling nearly $600 million to land more missions on the Moon with science payloads, demonstrate our commitment to accelerating our effort to build a long-term presence on the lunar surface, and give us more opportunity to develop the skills we need to prosper there,” said Lori Glaze, associate administrator for the Human Spaceflight Mission Directorate at NASA Headquarters in Washington.



Astrobotic is awarded $297.9 million total for two deliveries, as well as Firefly Aerospace $144.2 million and Intuitive Machines $148.3 million for one delivery each as part of the agency’s CLPS (Commercial Lunar Payload Services) initiative, a backbone of the Moon Base. Each will use updated versions of already-flown lander designs to enable NASA’s increased mission cadence.



“We’re building a proving ground for Moon Base operations,” said Ryan Stephan, NASA’s Moon Base acting director of cargo landers. “Accelerating our Moon mission ordering cadence and launch opportunities enable us to move quickly to learn, iterate, and improve.”



With 17 lunar surface deliveries across multiple providers, NASA also announced new opportunities for American industry to contribute to the Moon Base. The agency is considering plans to send to the Moon, PROMISE (Polar Rover for Observation, Mapping, and In-Situ Exploration), an engineering development version of the Mars Perseverance rover. Agency experts will define potential opportunities for PROMISE to characterize the lunar surface, subsurface, and prospect for resources.



In addition, NASA plans to solicit proposals in the coming months for lunar landers to deliver a power and avionics technology demonstration, another science manifest, and a South Pole optical imager. NASA also will share an open solicitation for Moon Base technology demonstrations and seek a lunar communication and navigation relay constellation to enable improved communication between Moon Base elements and Earth.



The awards announced June 30 will play a critical role in establishing the infrastructure for lunar surface operations. The companies are responsible for initiating and executing procurements, providing an assessment of a similar previous lunar lander, and incorporating lessons learned to improve the overall mission reliability.  



Each delivery will carry three NASA payloads to the lunar surface:




Stereo Camera for Lunar Plume Surface Studies (SCALPSS): An array of four cameras that uses a technique called stereo photogrammetry to produce a 3D view of the impact of an engine’s exhaust plume on lunar dust as the lander descends on the Moon’s surface. Collecting data from a variety of engine sizes, propellants, and landing locations, these high-resolution stereo images will aid in creating models to predict lunar dust erosion and ejecta characteristics, playing a vital role as bigger, heavier spacecraft and hardware are delivered to the Moon near each other.



Laser Retroreflector Array (LRA): Reflects laser beams transmitted by Moon orbiters or landing spacecraft to help them determine their orbit position or navigate to the surface. A small cookie-sized device made of eight quartz corner-cube prisms set into a dome-shaped aluminum frame, the array is passive, requiring no power or maintenance. These arrays have flown on previous CLPS landers and international lunar landers and will continue to be used to build a network of permanent location markers on the Moon for future exploration.



Linear Energy Transfer Spectrometer (LETS): Helps to better understand the radiation environment from a variety of lunar transit approaches and at different locations on the lunar surface. Derived from heritage hardware, this radiation monitor uses a tiny, advanced silicon detector to measure the energy carried by incoming space radiation. It will provide information about how strong radiation is and what kind of radiation is hitting the lunar surface, and provides the kind of detailed radiation data NASA needs to design safer missions, protect astronauts, and plan long‑duration exploration.




The agency also is reviewing options for these landers to deliver potential additional payloads to the Moon.



“By flying the same science instruments on multiple landers, we will better understand potential hazards during landing and build out a global network of environmental data and location markers on the Moon,” said Joel Kearns, deputy associate administrator for exploration, Science Mission Directorate, NASA Headquarters. “It’s akin to having weather stations in different locations on Earth. These three payloads are flight-proven and their data is critical to supporting safe human exploration of the lunar surface.”



NASA is advancing development of the Moon Base, a long-term lunar exploration and infrastructure initiative designed to enable sustained human presence and expanded scientific and commercial activity on the lunar surface.



As part of the Golden Age of innovation and exploration, NASA will send astronauts on increasingly difficult missions to explore more of the Moon for scientific discovery, economic benefits, and to build on our foundation for the first crewed missions to Mars.



For more information about NASA’s Moon Base plans, visit:



https://www.nasa.gov/moonbase



-end-



Rachel Kraft / Molly WasserHeadquarters, Washington202-358-1600rachel.h.kraft@nasa.gov / molly.l.wasser@nasa.gov



Ivry Artis / Kenna PellJohnson Space Center, Houston281-483-5111ivry.w.artis@nasa.gov / kenna.m.pell@nasa.gov

title: LG Sinha to flag off first Amarnath yatra batch tomorrow
description:
55,000 pilgrim capacity accommodation in Jammu: Div Com
 Pilgrims directed to travel only via Jammu-Sgr highway
Srinagar, June 30: Divisional Commissioner Jammu Ramesh Kumar on Tuesday said elaborate arrangements, including accommodation for nearly 55,000 pilgrims and enhanced security measures, have been put in place for the smooth conduct of the annual Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra beginning July 3.
The first batch of pilgrims will be flagged off by Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha, Chairman of the Shri Amarnath Shrine Board (SASB), from Bhagwati Nagar base camp in Jammu at 4 am on July 2. The 57-day pilgrimage to the 3,880-metre-high holy cave shrine will commence simultaneously through the traditional 48-km Nunwan-Pahalgam route in Anantnag district and the shorter but steeper 14-km Baltal route in Ganderbal district.
“As of now, arrangements have been made to accommodate around 55,000 pilgrims across the Jammu division. Comprehensive arrangements related to accommodation, food, sanitation, healthcare, transport and security have been put in place so that no pilgrim faces inconvenience,” Kumar told reporters in Jammu. 
Speaking on the occasion, Inspector General of Police (IGP), Jammu Zone, Bhim Sen Tuti said an even stronger security cover than previous years has been deployed for this year’s Yatra.
He said pilgrims arriving at Lakhanpur between 6 am and 8 am will be escorted to Jammu under security cover, while those arriving after the cut-off timing will have to halt there due to security restrictions. Authorities have directed pilgrims to use only the Jammu-Srinagar National Highway, while movement through alternate routes, including Mughal Road and Dhar Road, has been barred for Yatra traffic.
Accommodation centres, including government lodging facilities, temporary shelters and arrangements supported by civil society groups, have been established from Lakhanpur to Banihal. Langars, sanitation facilities and healthcare services have also been strengthened along the Yatra route. On-the-spot registration for pilgrims will commence on Wednesday at the Tawi River Front in Jammu, where the registration centre has been shifted to reduce inconvenience for city residents.
Mandatory RFID cards for tracking and security will be issued at designated centres, including Jammu Railway Station, Bhagwati Nagar, Tawi River Front, Udhampur, Chanderkote, Banihal, Lakhanpur and Samba. Separate registration facilities have also been established for sadhus at Geeta Bhawan and Purani Mandi temple.
The administration has advised elderly pilgrims and those suffering from cardiac or respiratory ailments to undertake the pilgrimage only after obtaining proper medical clearance and carrying mandatory health certificates.
Pilgrims travelling in private vehicles have been directed to report at Bhagwati Nagar base camp by 10 pm a day before departure for security checks and other formalities. Drivers have also been urged to avoid fatigue and driving under the influence of intoxicants due to the challenging terrain along the highway. Nearly 2,100 toilets have been installed along the Yatra route, while sightseeing bus services for waiting pilgrims have also been arranged in collaboration with the Tourism Department and Jammu Municipal Corporation.

title: അറിഞ്ഞിരിക്കണം ഈ വമ്പൻ മാറ്റങ്ങൾ! റെയിൽവേ പിഴ തുക കൂടും, പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിരക്കുകൾ ഉയരും; ഇന്ന് മുതൽ രാജ്യത്തുണ്ടാകുന്ന പ്രധാന മാറ്റങ്ങൾ ഇതാ
description: ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ രാജ്യത്ത് നിരവധി സാമ്പത്തിക മാറ്റങ്ങൾ പ്രാബല്യത്തിൽ വരുന്നു. ട്രെയിൻ യാത്രയിലെ പിഴ വർദ്ധന, പുതിയ പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിരക്കുകൾ, എൽപിജി വിലയിലെ മാറ്റങ്ങൾ, ആധാർ സൗജന്യ അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ് എന്നിവ ഇതിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നു. ഈ മാറ്റങ്ങൾ സാധാരണക്കാരെ എങ്ങനെ ബാധിക്കുമെന്ന് വിശദമായി അറിയാം.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: ജൂലൈ ഒന്ന് മുതൽ രാജ്യത്തെ വിവിധ മേഖലകളിൽ ജനങ്ങളെ നേരിട്ട് ബാധിക്കുന്ന നിരവധി സുപ്രധാന മാറ്റങ്ങൾ പ്രാബല്യത്തിൽ വരികയാണ്. റെയിൽവേ പിഴത്തുക, പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിരക്കുകൾ, എൽപിജി വില, ആധാർ അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ് ഉൾപ്പെടെയുള്ള വിവിധ വിഷയങ്ങളിലാണ് നിർണായകമായ ഈ പരിഷ്‌കാരങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടാകുന്നത് ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ പ്രാബല്യത്തിൽ വരുന്ന പ്രധാന മാറ്റങ്ങൾ താഴെ പറയുന്നവയാണ്:</p><h2>ട്രെയിൻ യാത്രക്കാർക്ക് കനത്ത പിഴ</h2><p>ടിക്കറ്റില്ലാതെ യാത്ര ചെയ്ത് പിടിക്കപ്പെട്ടാൽ ഈടാക്കുന്ന പിഴത്തുക ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ 250 രൂപയിൽ നിന്നും 500 രൂപയായി ഉയരും. സ്ത്രീകൾക്കായി റിസർവ് ചെയ്തിട്ടുള്ള കോച്ചുകളിൽ യാത്ര ചെയ്യുന്ന പുരുഷ യാത്രക്കാർക്ക് 2500 രൂപ വരെ പിഴ ചുമത്തും. ഇതിനുപുറമേ, മറ്റൊരാളുടെ പേരിൽ എടുത്ത ടിക്കറ്റുമായി യാത്ര ചെയ്യുക, ട്രെയിനിൽ ബഹളം വയ്ക്കുക, നിയമവിരുദ്ധമായി സാധനങ്ങൾ വിൽക്കുക എന്നിവയും കനത്ത പിഴ ഈടാക്കുന്നതിന് കാരണമാകും.</p><h2>പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിരക്കുകൾ വർദ്ധിക്കും</h2><p>ഇന്ന് മുതൽ പുതിയ പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് എടുക്കുന്നതിനുള്ള ചെലവ് വർദ്ധിക്കും. 36 പേജുള്ള സാധാരണ പാസ്‌പോർട്ടിനുള്ള അപേക്ഷാ ഫീസ് നിലവിലെ 1,500 രൂപയിൽ നിന്നും 2,500 രൂപയായി കൂടും. 60 പേജുള്ള പാസ്‌പോർട്ടിന്റെ നിരക്ക് 2,000 രൂപയിൽ നിന്ന് 3,500 രൂപയായി ഉയരും. തത്കാൽ വിഭാഗത്തിൽ 36 പേജുള്ള പാസ്‌പോർട്ടിന് 5,000 രൂപയും, 60 പേജുള്ള തത്കാൽ പാസ്‌പോർട്ടിന് 6,000 രൂപയുമാണ് പുതിയ നിരക്ക്.</p><h3>ഇന്ധന-എൽപിജി വിതരണത്തിലെ മാറ്റങ്ങൾ</h3><p>പെട്രോൾ, ഡീസൽ വിതരണത്തിൽ ഏർപ്പെടുത്തിയിരുന്ന താൽക്കാലിക നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങൾ ഇന്ന് മുതൽ പിൻവലിക്കും. ഇനി മുതൽ 200 ലിറ്റർ ഡീസൽ പരിധി ഉണ്ടായിരിക്കില്ല. ആഭ്യന്തര - വാണിജ്യ എൽപിജി സിലിണ്ടറുകളുടെ വില പുതുക്കി നിശ്ചയിക്കും. ഇതോടൊപ്പം സിഎൻജി, പിഎൻജി, എടിഎഫ് വിലകളിലും പരിഷ്കരണങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടായേക്കാം.</p><h3>ആധാർ കാർഡ് സൗജന്യ അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ്</h3><p>ആധാർ കാർഡിൽ ഇ-മെയിൽ വിലാസം അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാത്തവർക്ക് ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ ഡിസംബർ വരെ അത് സൗജന്യമായി ചെയ്യാൻ അവസരമുണ്ട്. മുൻപ് ഇതിനായി 75 രൂപ ഫീസ് ഈടാക്കിയിരുന്നു.</p><h3>ആദായ നികുതി റിട്ടേൺ സമയപരിധി</h3><p>2025-26 സാമ്പത്തിക വർഷത്തെ ആദായ നികുതി റിട്ടേൺ ഫയൽ ചെയ്യുന്നവർ 2026 ജൂലൈ 31-ന് മുൻപായി റിട്ടേൺ സമർപ്പിക്കേണ്ടതാണ്. ഈ നിശ്ചിത തീയതിക്കുള്ളിൽ ഫയൽ ചെയ്യാത്തവരിൽ നിന്ന് പിഴ ഈടാക്കും.</p><h3>പുതിയ തൊഴിലുറപ്പ് പദ്ധതി</h3><p>നിലവിലുള്ള തൊഴിലുറപ്പ് പദ്ധതി പരിഷ്കരിച്ച് 'വിബിജി രാംജി' എന്ന പേരിലുള്ള പുതിയ പദ്ധതി ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ രാജ്യത്ത് ആരംഭിക്കുകയാണ്.</p><h3>ദേശീയ സെൻസസ് നടപടികൾ</h3><p>ദേശീയ സെൻസസിന്റെ ഭാഗമായി പൊതുജനങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്വയം വിവരങ്ങൾ രേഖപ്പെടുത്താനുള്ള സെൽഫ് എന്യൂമറേഷൻ സമയം ഇന്ന് അർധരാത്രിയോടെ അവസാനിക്കും. നാളെ മുതൽ സെൻസസ് ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥർ നേരിട്ട് വീടുകളിലെത്തി വിവരശേഖരണം നടത്തും.</p><h3>പിഎം കിസാൻ ഇ-കെവൈസി</h3><p>പിഎം കിസാൻ പദ്ധതി വഴി ലഭിക്കുന്ന 6,000 രൂപയുടെ ആനുകൂല്യം മുടങ്ങാതെ ലഭിക്കുന്നതിനായി ഗുണഭോക്താക്കൾ തങ്ങളുടെ ഇ-കെവൈസി സ്റ്റാറ്റസ് ഓൺലൈൻ കേന്ദ്രങ്ങൾ വഴിയോ ഔദ്യോഗിക ആപ്പ് വഴിയോ പരിശോധിച്ച് ഉറപ്പുവരുത്തേണ്ടതുണ്ട്.</p>

title: मुख्यमंत्री देवेन्द्र फडणवीस ने कहा- अनुसूचित जातियों के उप वर्गीकरण पर अभी अंतिम निर्णय नहीं
description: SC Sub Classification Decision: अनुसूचित जातियों के उप वर्गीकरण पर महाराष्ट्र सरकार ने अभी अंतिम फैसला नहीं लिया है। सुझाव-आपत्तियों और सभी पक्षों से चर्चा के बाद ही निर्णय लिया जाएगा।
content:
Maharashtra SC Sub Classification Decision: अनुसूचित जातियों के उप वर्गीकरण को लेकर महाराष्ट्र सरकार ने स्पष्ट किया है कि इस विषय पर अभी कोई अंतिम निर्णय नहीं लिया गया है। विधानसभा में इस मुद्दे पर हुई चर्चा के दौरान उपमुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने कहा कि सरकार किसी भी प्रकार का निर्णय व्यापक विचार-विमर्श, सुझाव और आपत्तियों पर गंभीरता से विचार करने के बाद ही करेगी।
इस मुद्दे पर सदन में तीखी बहस हुई और विपक्ष ने सरकार के रुख का विरोध करते हुए वॉकआउट किया। कांग्रेस विधायक दल के नेता विजय वडेट्टीवार ने मांग की कि बदर समिति की रिपोर्ट सार्वजनिक किए बिना और सभी संबंधित पक्षों से विस्तृत चर्चा किए बिना इस विषय पर कोई विधेयक पारित नहीं किया जाए। उन्होंने कहा कि इतने संवेदनशील विषय पर जल्दबाजी में निर्णय लेने से सामाजिक असंतोष बढ़ सकता है। सरकार को सभी वर्गों की राय लेने के बाद ही आगे बढ़ना चाहिए।
सुप्रीम कोर्ट के निर्देशों के अनुसार हो रही प्रक्रिया
देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने सदन में स्पष्ट किया कि अनुसूचित जाति आरक्षण में किसी नए वर्ग को शामिल करने का कोई प्रश्न ही नहीं उठता। उन्होंने कहा कि राज्य सरकार केवल सुप्रीम कोर्ट के निर्देशों का पालन कर रही है। इसी उद्देश्य से बदर समिति का गठन किया गया था, जिसने अपनी रिपोर्ट सरकार को सौंप दी है। वर्तमान में उस रिपोर्ट पर जनता से सुझाव और आपत्तियां आमंत्रित की जा रही हैं ताकि सभी पक्षों की राय सामने आ सके।
उपमुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि सरकार पारदर्शी प्रक्रिया अपनाना चाहती है और किसी भी निर्णय से पहले सामाजिक, कानूनी और प्रशासनिक पहलुओं का गंभीर अध्ययन किया जाएगा। उन्होंने यह भी स्पष्ट किया कि अंतिम निर्णय केवल विधिक प्रावधानों और संविधान के अनुरूप ही लिया जाएगा।
यह भी पढ़ेः-  महाराष्ट्र में बाल अपराधियों की आयु सीमा 16 वर्ष करने का प्रस्ताव,गंभीर अपराधों पर सख्ती की तैयारी 
जनप्रतिनिधियों और सभी पक्षों से होगी व्यापक चर्चा
उपमुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि महाराष्ट्र सरकार इस विषय पर किसी भी प्रकार का निर्णय एकतरफा नहीं करेगी। उन्होंने कर्नाटक और तेलंगाना जैसे राज्यों का उदाहरण देते हुए कहा कि वहां भी इस तरह के मुद्दों पर विस्तृत चर्चा के बाद निर्णय लिए गए हैं। महाराष्ट्र में भी सभी जनप्रतिनिधियों, सामाजिक संगठनों, संबंधित समुदायों और विशेषज्ञों को विश्वास में लेकर आगे की प्रक्रिया तय की जाएगी।
सरकार का उद्देश्य सामाजिक न्याय के साथ-साथ सामाजिक समरसता बनाए रखना है। फडणवीस ने आश्वासन दिया कि सभी सुझावों और आपत्तियों का निष्पक्ष मूल्यांकन किया जाएगा तथा कानून और संविधान की भावना के अनुरूप ही अंतिम फैसला लिया जाएगा, ताकि किसी भी वर्ग के साथ अन्याय न हो और समाज में विश्वास कायम रहे।

title: Javid Dar meets public delegations at Civil Secretariat
description:
Jammu, June 30: Minister for Agriculture Production, Rural Development and Panchayati Raj, Cooperatives and Election Department, Javid Ahmad Dar, on Tuesday met senior officers of the Rural Development, Animal Husbandry and Horticulture departments besides interacting with several public delegations at the Civil Secretariat, Jammu.
During the meetings, the Minister reviewed a wide range of public issues and developmental projects pertaining to the concerned departments. He took stock of the progress of ongoing initiatives and emphasized the need for timely implementation of development works to ensure effective delivery of public services.
The public delegations apprised the Minister of various issues and demands concerning their respective areas.
Giving a patient hearing to all the representations, Javid Dar assured the delegations that every genuine grievance would be addressed in a phased and time-bound manner.

title: Reacher Season 4 OTT Release Date: When And Where To Watch Alan Ritchson's Action Drama And Lee Child Adaptation
description: After news came that Amazon Prime Video had renewed Reacher for Season 5, the streamer has finally revealed the premiere date. Reacher will premiere on August 12 and its spinoff series Neagley starring Maria Sten will debut in September 2026.
content: Reacher fans have been waiting a long time for news on Season 4 after the third season ended in March 2025. The crime drama, starring Alan Ritchson as Jack Reacher, is back on your TV screens from August 12. Last month, Amazon Prime Video revealed that the series would be moving ahead with Season 5. But that's not all; after Reacher ends, fans still have the spinoff series to look forward to. Starring Maria Sten in the title role, Neagley will start after Reacher's Season 4 finale on September 16. Here's all you need to know about the show, including some first looks at Ritchson and Sten. Alan Ritchson's Reacher Season 4 to lead to Neagley spinoff seriesOn social media, the official handle of Reacher on Instagram dropped the premiere dates for both shows while sharing a new still of the characters Reacher and Neagley. The first three episodes of Reacher will premiere on August 12 and continue with weekly episodes every Wednesday. On September 16, however, all eight episodes of Neagley will debut at once.     The fourth season of Reacher will adapt Lee Child's 13th book titled Gone Tomorrow. The new instalment is set in New York, where Reacher finds himself as an involuntary witness to a woman's suicide on the subway. He later finds out that the woman named Susan Mark worked at the Pentagon and was involved in a conspiracy that led to many dead bodies, a corrupt politician and some Al Qaeda terrorists. Reacher and Susan's brother Jacob follow the leads to find out what Susan took such a drastic step while also find her missing son Peter. But will Reacher be able to save himself as well. Ritchson's co-stars on the new season include Barry actor Christopher Rodriguez-Marquette, who replaced Jay Baruchel, Sydelle Noel, My Life With the Walter Boys actor Marc Blucas, Kevin Weisman, Indonesian singers Agnez Mo and Anggun, actress Kathleen Robertson, and Kevin Corrigan. Showrunner Nick Santora is also back for Season 4.What is the Neagley spinoff series about? When the private investigator finds out that a dear old friend has been mysteriously killed, Neagley is determined to investigate. The dogged former master sergeant from the Army’s 110th Special Investigations Unit is on a path of destruction with her findings. The good news is that Ritchson will also have a guest starring role on Neageley. Sten reprises her role as Frances Neagley; she is joined by Greyston Holt as Detective Hudson Riley, Adeline Rudolph as Renee Birdwhistle, Jasper Jones as Keno, Matthew Del Negro as Pierce Woodrow and Damon Herriman as Lawrence Cole.

title: Iran Still Waiting for $6 Billion in Frozen Assets Promised by US, Qatar Confirms
description: Qatari officials are mediating between the US and Iranian delegations, who are not meeting directly, to facilitate document preparation for potential future agreements.
content: Qatar on Tuesday said none of the $6 billion in Iranian assets frozen under US sanctions has been transferred, despite ongoing negotiations between Washington and Tehran over implementing a memorandum of understanding. "So far, no funds have been transferred," Qatar's Foreign Ministry spokesman Majed Al Ansari said, as Iranian officials prepared to travel to Doha for technical talks on the next phase of the agreement. Iran has argued that the money should be released in a single payment. However, the United States is seeking to disburse the funds in smaller, incremental amounts, reportedly paying vendors directly as Iran makes progress on commitments including nuclear concessions and measures to ensure the free flow of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. Technical Talks in Doha Al Ansari said technical-level contacts between Iran and the United States remained ongoing but stressed that no high-level negotiations were currently taking place under the existing framework. "There are currently no high-level meetings between the Iranian and American parties under the adopted negotiation mechanism," he told a media briefing. He said the visit by US Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to Doha formed part of consultations with Qatari officials and mediators on several regional issues, including discussions relating to Iran and Lebanon. According to Al Ansari, technical discussions between Iranian and US officials have continued since earlier meetings in Switzerland, taking place both directly and indirectly with mediation by Qatar. "The Iranian and American technical delegations were still in session," he said, adding that the talks were being held in different formats with mediators participating to ensure the process continued. The Doha negotiations differ from talks held earlier this month in Switzerland, where senior Iranian and US delegations met face-to-face behind closed doors. Those discussions were led by US Vice-President JD Vance and Iran's chief negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf. The current round in Doha is being conducted at a technical level, with the US delegation headed by Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and the Iranian team led by Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi. Unlike the Switzerland meeting, the two delegations are not expected to meet directly. Instead, Qatari officials are acting as intermediaries between the two sides. Al Ansari said the purpose of the technical negotiations was to "produce documents that will be elevated to principles in the high-level meetings to agree upon." Issues Under Discussion According to Qatari officials, the technical talks are focused on several key issues, including: Financial restrictions and the possible lifting of sanctions on Iran. Measures to ensure the free flow of vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. The future of Iran's nuclear programme. The potential release of Iran's frozen assets. Regional security.

title: Google's new Nano Banana 2 Lite image model is its fastest and cheapest yet
description: They may not look as good, but Nano Banana 2 Lite images only take a few seconds to create.
content:
There are plenty of AI image-generation models these days, but the ones capable of quality outputs tend to be slow and expensive. Google DeepMind says its new image model, known as Nano Banana 2 Lite, offers the best balance of quality and speed. It's available today across the Google ecosystem, creating images in a fraction of the time it takes Google's beefier models.
The new model is part of the Gemini 3.1 family—it's technically called Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Image. On one hand, Google says this model is ideal for exploring ideas and "rapid-fire" prototyping, applications in which quality can take a backseat. However, the company has also provided some examples aimed at showing how close Nano Banana 2 Lite can get to the quality of its other image models.

      A comparison of Nano Banana 2 Lite with the non-Lite version.
        Credit:
          Google
      
In addition to the examples, Google also has Elo scores from Arena.ai ready to go, showing that users rate Nano Banana 2 Lite outputs almost as highly as the non-Lite versions. However, vibemarking doesn't always focus on the details that can make AI images look silly upon closer inspection. Google notes that Nano Banana 2 Lite tends to have more trouble with text, particularly if it's very small, and infographics are more likely to include incorrect data. Characters and people may also show poor consistency across iterations.Read full article

title: PM Modi Chairs High-Level Meet With Top Bureaucrats, Seeks End Of Bureaucratic Silos, Pushes Aatmanirbharata
description: PM Modi led a significant meeting with secretaries of central ministries to discuss policy reforms in the country.
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday chaired a high-level meeting with the secretaries of central ministries. The discussion focused on two key themes -- the first was "deregulation and other reforms for Ease of Doing Business and Ease of Living"; while the second was "Promoting Aatmanirbharta". During the interaction, the Secretaries outlined the major steps being taken by their ministries and departments in line with the two key themes. They highlighted ongoing efforts to translate the Prime Minister's vision into actionable outcomes, while also discussing sector-specific challenges and outlining their future strategies to enhance governance and service delivery.Prime Minister stressed the importance of adopting a whole-of-government approach and breaking departmental silos. Highlighting the importance of integrated planning and coordination, the Prime Minister encouraged wider utilisation of the PM GatiShakti as an effective platform for inter-departmental coordination and informed decision-making.Prime Minister exhorted the Secretaries to focus on the tangible impact of Schemes on the lives of people.Notably, PM Modi has already set the government's goal of turning India into a developed country by 2047, when it celebrates 100 years of its independence. The Prime Minister had earlier outlined the reform priorities for the next 10 years, asserting that his government's "Reform Express" has delivered systemic transformation and benefited citizens in a significant way.India's GDP Growth Rate Of 7.7% In 2025-26India's economy expanded by 7.8 per cent in the January-March quarter, exceeding forecasts on strong domestic demand and government expenditure. The GDP growth was compared with a 7 per cent expansion a year ago. The full-year growth accelerated to 7.7 per cent from 7.1 per cent in FY25, supported by healthy consumption and robust investment activity.At a meeting of the council of ministers on June 21, PM Modi had said the government shall leave no stone unturned to further "Ease of Living", "Ease of Doing Business" and increase opportunities for youngsters.(With agency inputs)

title: Aaj Ka Rashifal 01 July 2026: इन राशि के जातकों को मिलेगा धन लाभ, जानें सभी 12 राशियों का आज का भविष्य
description: Aaj Ka Rashifal 01 July 2026: जानिए कैसा रहेगा मंगलवार का दिन। किसे मिलेगा अटका धन और कमोडिटी बाजार में गेहूं, चना व तेल के भावों का सटीक समय चक्र के साथ व्यापारिक अनुमान।
content:
Daily Horoscope 01 July 2026: बुधवार 1 जुलाई 2026 का दिन कई राशियों के लिए बेहद ही शुभ साबित हो सकता है। इस दिन कई राशि के जातकों के लिए नए अवसर देखने के लिए मिल सकते हैं, तो कई जातकों को सावधान रहने की जरूरत हो सकती है। मेष, तुला और धनु राशि के जातकों के लिए 1 जुलाई की तारीख सफलता लेकर आ सकती हैं और लाभ के भी योग दिखाई दे रहे हैं।
इसके अलावा सिंह, कन्या और कुंभ राशि वालों को इस दिन सोच-समझकर कोई भी फैसला लेने की सलाह दी जा रही है। आइए जानते हैं सभी 12 राशियों का आज का राशिफल, आज जन्मे बालक का भविष्य, व्यापार भविष्य और भाग्यांक।
आज के दिन जन्में बालक भाग्यवान, चतुर, मेहनती और बुद्धिमान होंगे। ये बालक जिस भी काम को करने का फैसला लेंगे, उसे पूरा करके ही रहेंगे। इन बालकों का शिक्षा के क्षेत्र में बेहतरीन प्रदर्शन रहेगा और आने वाले समय में व्यापार और नौकरी दोनों में भी ये सफलता हासिल करेंगे। इन जातकों की धार्मिक कार्यों में विशेष रुचि रहेगी और समाज में भी इनका सम्मान बढ़ेगा।
मेष से मीन राशि का दैनिक भाग्य
मेष
मेष राशि वाले जातकों के लिए सामूहिक कार्यों में सभी की सलाह लाभदायक सिद्ध होगी। बुजुर्गों के स्वास्थ्य को लेकर चिंता बनी रह सकती है। सुख-सुविधाओं में वृद्धि होगी और सामाजिक कार्यों में सफलता प्राप्त होगी।
वृषभ
वृषभ राशि वाले जातकों के लिए बातों-बातों में किसी नए कार्य की शुरुआत हो सकती है। आवश्यकताओं की पूर्ति के लिए उधार लेने की स्थिति बन सकती है। लंबे समय से रुके कार्य पूरे होंगे और योजनाओं का विस्तार होगा।
मिथुन
मिथुन राशि वाले जातकों के लिए राजकीय मामलों में लापरवाही नुकसान का कारण बन सकती है। विवाह संबंधी चर्चाओं में सफलता मिलेगी। अधूरे कार्य पूरे होंगे तथा शिक्षा के क्षेत्र में अच्छे परिणाम प्राप्त होंगे।
कर्क
कर्क राशि वाले जातकों के लिए धार्मिक आयोजनों में धन खर्च हो सकता है। न चाहते हुए भी आलोचनाओं का सामना करना पड़ सकता है। महत्वपूर्ण कार्यों में विलंब संभव है, हालांकि पुराने विवादों का समाधान मिलने के संकेत हैं।
सिंह
सिंह राशि वाले जातकों के लिए कानूनी मामलों में पक्ष मजबूत रहेगा। करीबी लोगों के व्यवहार से मन दुखी हो सकता है। मानसिक अस्थिरता बनी रहेगी तथा नियमित कार्यों में कुछ बाधाएं आ सकती हैं।
कन्या
कन्या राशि वाले जातकों के लिए सुविधाओं के अभाव में कार्यों में कठिनाई महसूस होगी। अनुभव का लाभ मिलेगा। नौकरी और सरकारी कार्यों में शुभ समाचार मिलने की संभावना है। परिवार के किसी सदस्य के स्वास्थ्य की चिंता रह सकती है।
तुला
तुला राशि वाले जातकों के लिए मतभेद समाप्त होने से रिश्तों में मधुरता आएगी। रूखे व्यवहार के कारण मित्र नाराज हो सकते हैं। पुराने कार्य पूरे होंगे तथा अचानक धन लाभ मिलने के योग बन रहे हैं।
वृश्चिक
वृश्चिक राशि वाले जातकों के लिए रुका हुआ धन मिलने की संभावना है। अपनों के व्यवहार से मन खिन्न हो सकता है। व्यापार में लाभ मिलेगा, लेकिन मित्रों के साथ मतभेद होने की आशंका भी रहेगी।
धनु
धनु राशि वाले जातकों के लिए सामाजिक क्षेत्र से जुड़े लोगों को लाभ मिलने के संकेत हैं। सुख-सुविधा के साधनों पर खर्च बढ़ सकता है। भूमि, भवन और संपत्ति संबंधी मामलों का समाधान होगा तथा पद-प्रतिष्ठा में वृद्धि होगी।
मकर
मकर राशि वाले जातकों के लिए कार्य संबंधी मामलों में सकारात्मक आश्वासन मिलेंगे। लापरवाही से कार्य अधूरे रह सकते हैं। नियमित दिनचर्या अपनाने और अधिक परिश्रम करने की आवश्यकता होगी।
कुंभ
कुंभ राशि वाले जातकों के लिए दुविधा की स्थिति में निर्णय लेना कठिन हो सकता है। खोई हुई वस्तु मिलने की संभावना है। पारिवारिक जीवन व्यवस्थित रहेगा, लेकिन सफलता के लिए अधिक मेहनत करनी होगी।
मीन
मीन राशि वाले जातकों के लिए अपने ही लोग उलझन पैदा करने का प्रयास कर सकते हैं। मांगलिक कार्यों पर विचार होगा। मान-सम्मान में वृद्धि होगी। किसी अनुभवी या विशेष व्यक्ति की सलाह आपके लिए लाभदायक सिद्ध होगी।
ये भी पढ़ें :-  Aaj Ka Rashifal 30 June 2026: मंगलवार को इन राशियों पर बरसेगी कृपा, जानें मेष से मीन तक का पूरा भविष्यफल
व्यापार भविष्य
आषाढ़ कृष्ण प्रतिपदा पर पूर्वाषाढ़ा नक्षत्र के प्रभाव से गुड़, खांड और चीनी के भाव सामान्य रह सकते हैं। जीरा, धनिया और हल्दी में मंदी के संकेत हैं। सोना और चांदी में उतार-चढ़ाव बना रहेगा। वायदा कारोबार करने वाले व्यापारी आज जिन वस्तुओं के भाव टूटते देखें, उनमें अगले दिन तेजी आने की संभावना पर नजर रख सकते हैं।
भाग्यांक : 2607

title: കോവളത്തേക്കെത്തിയ കാറിലെ 'രഹസ്യം' ചോർന്നു, വഴിയിൽ കാത്തുനിന്ന് പൊലീസ്, വെട്ടിച്ച് രക്ഷപ്പെടാൻ യുവാക്കളുടെ ശ്രമം; സാഹസികമായി കീഴടക്കി, വൻ ലഹരിവേട്ട
description: ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന്‍റെ ഭാഗമായി തിരുവനന്തപുരത്ത് വൻ ലഹരിവേട്ട. ബെംഗളൂരുവിൽ നിന്ന് 110 ഗ്രാം എംഡിഎംഎയുമായി കാറിൽ വന്ന അഖിൽ, അച്ചു എന്നിവരെ പൊലീസ് സാഹസികമായി പിന്തുടർന്ന് പിടികൂടി. ഇവരിൽ നിന്ന് ഹാഷിഷ് ഓയിലും കഞ്ചാവും കണ്ടെത്തിയിട്ടുണ്ട്
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന്‍റെ ഭാഗമായി തലസ്ഥാനത്ത് വൻ ലഹരിവേട്ട. 110 ഗ്രാം എം ഡി എം എയുമായി രണ്ടു യുവാക്കളെ സിറ്റി ഡാൻസാഫ് സംഘം കോവളത്ത് വച്ച് പിടികൂടി. പൊലിസിനെ വെട്ടിച്ച് കാറിൽ രക്ഷപ്പെടാൻ ശ്രമിച്ച പ്രതികളെ പിന്തുടർന്ന് സാഹസികമായി പിടികൂടുകയായിരുന്നു. ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന്‍റെ ഭാഗമായി തലസ്ഥാനത്ത് വ്യാപകമായ പരിശോധനകള്‍ കഴിഞ്ഞ ദിവസങ്ങളിൽ നടന്നുവരുകയായിരുന്നു. ഇതിനിടെയാണ് വൻതോതിൽ ലഹരി വസ്തു ബെംഗളൂരുവിൽ നിന്നും കൊണ്ടുവരുന്നുവെന്ന വിവരം ഡാൻസാഫിന് ലഭിച്ചത്. ബെംഗളൂരുവിലേക്ക് പോയ ഒരു കാറിന്‍റെ വിവരം ലഭിച്ചു. കോവളം ബൈപ്പാസ് വഴി സംശയിക്കുന്ന കാർ വരുന്നത് ശ്രദ്ധയിൽപ്പെട്ട ഡാൻസാഫ് സംഘം വാഹനം തടഞ്ഞു. പൊലിസിനെ വെട്ടിച്ച് വാഹനം മുന്നോട്ടു പോയി. പൊലിസ് പിന്തുടർന്ന് വാഹനം തടഞ്ഞു. കാറിന്‍റെ ഡോർ തുറക്കാൻ പ്രതികൾ തയ്യാറായില്ല. ഒടുവിൽ കാറിന്‍റെ ചില്ലുകള്‍ പൊട്ടിച്ച് വാഹനത്തിലുണ്ടായിരുന്ന രണ്ടുപേരെ കീഴ്പ്പെടുത്തിയാണ് എം ഡി എം എ കണ്ടെടുത്തത്.</p><h2><strong>അന്വേഷണം തുടരും</strong></h2><p>കാറിലുണ്ടായിരുന്ന അഖിൽ, അച്ചു എന്നിവരെ പൊലീസ് സാഹസികമായി പിടികൂടുകയും ചെയ്തു. 110 ഗ്രാം എം ഡി എം എയും ഹാഷിഷ് ഓയിലും കഞ്ചാവും ഇവരിൽ നിന്നും കണ്ടെത്തി. അച്ചുവിന്‍റെ സഹോദരൻ എം ഡി എം എ കേസിൽ ജയിലാണ്. ഇത് ആദ്യമായാണ് ലഹരിക്കേസിൽ ഇവരുവരും പിടിയിലായകുന്നത്. ഇരുവരുടെയും പണത്തിന്‍റെ ഉറവിടവും സഹായികളെ കുറിച്ചുള്ള വിവരം ലഭിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ടെന്നും അന്വേഷണം തുടരുകയാണെന്നും കമ്മീഷണർ അരുണ്‍ ബി കൃഷ്ണ പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p></p>

title: കേരളത്തിന്‍റെ പേരുമാറ്റൽ ഒടുവിൽ യാഥാർത്ഥ്യത്തിലേക്ക്, രാഷ്ട്രപതിയുടെ റഫറൻസ് ഏകകണ്ഠമായി അംഗീകരിക്കാൻ നിയമസഭ; 'കേരള' കേരളം ആകാൻ അധികം വൈകില്ല!
description: 'കേരള' എന്നതിൽ നിന്ന് 'കേരളം' എന്നാക്കി മാറ്റാനുള്ള നടപടികൾ നിർണായക ഘട്ടത്തിലേക്ക്. രാഷ്ട്രപതിയുടെ റഫറൻസ് നിയമസഭ ഏകകണ്ഠമായി അംഗീകരിച്ച ശേഷം പ്രമേയം ലോക്സഭയുടെ പരിഗണനയ്ക്ക് അയക്കും. ശേഷം കേന്ദ്ര വിജ്ഞാപനം വന്നാൽ പേരുമാറ്റം ഔദ്യോഗികമായി നിലവിൽ വരും
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: സംസ്ഥാനത്തിന്റെ പേര് ഔദ്യോഗിക രേഖകളിൽ കേരള എന്നുള്ളത് കേരളം ആക്കി മാറ്റുന്നത് യാഥാർഥ്യത്തിലേക്ക്. പേരുമാറ്റലിന്‍റെ ഭാഗമായുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രപതിയുടെ റഫറൻസ് ബുധനാഴ്ച (ജൂലൈ 1) നിയമസഭ അംഗീകരിക്കും. ഏകകണ്ഠമായി അംഗീകരിച്ച ശേഷം പിന്നീട് ലോക്സഭയ്ക്ക് അയച്ചു കൊടുക്കും. ലോക്സഭ കൂടി പാസാക്കി കേന്ദ്രം വിജ്ഞാപനം ഇറക്കുന്നതോടെ സംസ്ഥാനത്തിന്റെ പേര് മാറ്റൽ യാഥാർത്ഥ്യമാകും. ശേഷം ഔദ്യോഗിക രേഖകളിൽ കേരള എന്നത് കേരളം എന്നായി മാറും. ഏറെ നാളത്തെ ആവശ്യത്തിനൊടുവിൽ ആണ് കേരള എന്നത് കേരളം എന്നായി മാറാൻ പോകുന്നത്.</p><h2><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് വാർത്തകൾ തത്സമയം കാണാം</strong></h2><p></p>

title: महाराष्ट्र में बाल अपराधियों की आयु सीमा 16 वर्ष करने का प्रस्ताव,गंभीर अपराधों पर सख्ती की तैयारी
description: Age Limit For Juvenile Offenders: महाराष्ट्र सरकार बाल अपराधियों की आयु सीमा 18 से घटाकर 16 वर्ष करने का प्रस्ताव केंद्र को भेजेगी। गंभीर अपराध, नशा तस्करी और संगठित गिरोहों पर सख्ती की तैयारी।
content:
16 Year Age Limit For Juvenile Offenders: महाराष्ट्र सरकार बाल अपराधियों की आयु सीमा 18 वर्ष से घटाकर 16 वर्ष करने का प्रस्ताव केंद्र सरकार को भेजेगी। मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने विधानसभा में कहा कि बच्चों का इस्तेमाल अपराध और मादक पदार्थों की तस्करी में करने वालों के खिलाफ सख्त कानूनी कार्रवाई के लिए कानून में आवश्यक बदलाव का प्रस्ताव भी रखा जाएगा।
गंभीर अपराधों में नाबालिगों के इस्तेमाल पर होगी सख्ती
जालना जिले में नाबालिगों से जुड़े बढ़ते अपराधों का मुद्दा विधानसभा में विधायक अर्जुन खोतकर ने उठाया, जिस पर वरिष्ठ विधायक सुधीर मुनगंटीवार ने भी चर्चा में भाग लिया। जवाब देते हुए मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने कहा कि कुछ संगठित अपराधी बाल न्याय कानून की मौजूदा व्यवस्था का दुरुपयोग कर नाबालिग बच्चों से गंभीर अपराध करवाते हैं।
सरकार के संज्ञान में ऐसे कई मामले आए हैं, जिनमें 16 वर्ष से कम आयु के बच्चों की हत्या, लूट, मादक पदार्थों की तस्करी और अन्य गंभीर अपराधों में संलिप्तता सामने आई है। मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने कहा कि इस गंभीर समस्या का वैज्ञानिक और व्यापक अध्ययन करने के लिए एक उच्चस्तरीय समिति गठित की जाएगी।
समिति की रिपोर्ट के आधार पर आवश्यक कानूनी और प्रशासनिक सुधार किए जाएंगे। साथ ही, संगठित अपराधों में बच्चों का इस्तेमाल करने वाले गिरोहों और उनके सरगनाओं के खिलाफ कड़े कानूनी प्रावधान लागू करने पर भी गंभीरता से विचार किया जाएगा, ताकि ऐसी घटनाओं पर प्रभावी रोक लगाई जा सके।
यह भी पढ़ेः-  महाराष्ट्र में 11 करोड़ वृक्षारोपण का लक्ष्य, मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस बोले- आधुनिक तकनीक से सफल होगा यह अभियान 
जागरूकता और पुनर्वास पर जोर
राज्यमंत्री योगेश कदम ने बताया कि राज्य में बाल अपराध रोकने के लिए स्कूलों और कॉलेजों में जागरूकता, परामर्श, साइबर सुरक्षा और नशा मुक्ति संबंधी कार्यक्रम चलाए जा रहे हैं। विशेष बाल पुलिस इकाइयों के माध्यम से &#8216;केयर&#8217; (सीएआरई) कार्यक्रम संचालित किया जा रहा है, जबकि बाल गृहों में शिक्षा, व्यक्तित्व विकास, परामर्श और पुनर्वास पर विशेष ध्यान दिया जा रहा है।

title: ‘Tonnes of rubble’: 58,000 buildings estimated destroyed in Venezuela earthquakes
description: Preliminary analysis of satellite data suggests magnitude of natural disaster could dwarf official estimatesMore than 58,000 buildings may have been damaged and destroyed by the twin earthquakes that hit Venezuela last week, according to a preliminary analysis of satellite data that suggests the scale of the destruction could dwarf official estimates.Last Wednesday’s back-to-back quakes – which measured magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 – killed at least 1,943 people, injured more than 10,571, and left tens of thousands missing amid the rubble. The UN migration agency has said that up to 6.8 million people could be affected by the disasters, and would require shelter, water, sanitation, healthcare and essential relief items. Continue reading...

title: ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ପହଞ୍ଚୁ ପହଞ୍ଚୁ ଟିମ୍‌ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆକୁ ବଡ଼ ଝଟ୍‌କା: ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜରୁ ବାଦ୍‌ ପଡ଼ିବେ ଏହି ଷ୍ଟାର ଖେଳାଳି!
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୩୦।୬: ଆୟରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍ ହରାଇବା ପରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ଦଳ ଏବେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ସାରିଛି। ଜୁଲାଇ ୧ ତାରିଖରୁ ଭାରତ ଏବଂ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୫ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ଏହା ପରେ ଖେଳାଯିବାକୁ ଥିବା ୩ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌କୁ ନେଇ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଦୁଃଖଦ ଖବର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଦଳର ଷ୍ଟାର୍ ଅଲରାଉଣ୍ଡର ନୀତିଶ କୁମାର ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ଆହତ ଜନିତ ସମସ୍ୟା ଯୋଗୁ […]
The post ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ପହଞ୍ଚୁ ପହଞ୍ଚୁ ଟିମ୍‌ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆକୁ ବଡ଼ ଝଟ୍‌କା: ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜରୁ ବାଦ୍‌ ପଡ଼ିବେ ଏହି ଷ୍ଟାର ଖେଳାଳି! appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୩୦।୬: ଆୟରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍ ହରାଇବା ପରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ଦଳ ଏବେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ସାରିଛି। ଜୁଲାଇ ୧ ତାରିଖରୁ ଭାରତ ଏବଂ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୫ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ଏହା ପରେ ଖେଳାଯିବାକୁ ଥିବା ୩ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌କୁ ନେଇ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଦୁଃଖଦ ଖବର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଦଳର ଷ୍ଟାର୍ ଅଲରାଉଣ୍ଡର ନୀତିଶ କୁମାର ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ଆହତ ଜନିତ ସମସ୍ୟା ଯୋଗୁ ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌ରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ବାଦ୍ ପଡ଼ିପାରନ୍ତି।
ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ୧୪ ତାରିଖରୁ ଭାରତ-ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବାକୁ ଥିବା ବେଳେ ସେପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ନୀତିଶ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଫିଟ୍ ହେବା ମୁସ୍କିଲ ମନେହେଉଛି। ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ସେ ଏବେ ମଧ୍ୟ ବେଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁ ସ୍ଥିତ ‘ସେଣ୍ଟର ଅଫ୍ ଏକ୍ସଲେନ୍ସ’ରେ ଅଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ତାଙ୍କର ରିହାବ୍ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇନାହିଁ।
ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଯେ, ପାଦରେ ଆଘାତ ଲାଗିବା କାରଣରୁ ସେ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଆୟରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡ ଏବଂ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍‌ରୁ ବାଦ୍ ପଡ଼ିଥିଲେ। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର ସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଦେଖିଲେ ନୀତିଶ ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ସିଧାସଳଖ ଜିମ୍ବାୱେ ଗସ୍ତ ସମୟରେ ହିଁ ଟିମ୍ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆକୁ ସ୍ୱଦେଶ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରିବେ। ଭାରତକୁ ଜିମ୍ବାୱେ ଗସ୍ତରେ ୩ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍ ଖେଳିବାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ରହିଛି।
ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ସବୁଠାରୁ ବଡ଼ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ହେଉଛି ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌ରେ ନୀତିଶ ରେଡ୍ଡୀଙ୍କ ସ୍ଥାନ କିଏ ନେବ? କାରଣ ଦଳର ଅନ୍ୟତମ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଅଲରାଉଣ୍ଡର ହାର୍ଦ୍ଦିକ ପାଣ୍ଡ୍ୟା ମଧ୍ୟ ଏହି ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌ରେ ଖେଳୁନାହାନ୍ତି। ଏଭଳି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଯୁବ ଖେଳାଳି ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟାଂଶ ଶେଡ୍‌ଗେଙ୍କ ଭାଗ୍ୟ ଖୋଲିପାରେ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଦଳ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଦିନିକିଆ କ୍ରିକେଟ୍‌ରେ ପଦାର୍ପଣ କରିବାର ସୁଯୋଗ ମିଳିପାରେ।
The post ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ପହଞ୍ଚୁ ପହଞ୍ଚୁ ଟିମ୍‌ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆକୁ ବଡ଼ ଝଟ୍‌କା: ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜରୁ ବାଦ୍‌ ପଡ଼ିବେ ଏହି ଷ୍ଟାର ଖେଳାଳି! appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: RFK Jr. stacks FDA panel with peptide peddlers as FDA scientists oppose access
description: Peptide drugs are popular, but FDA scientists warn they're untested, may be harmful.
content:
Anti-vaccine Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has stacked another federal advisory panel with allies, advancing his efforts to force the Food and Drug Administration to reverse its stance on a dozen popular but unproven injectable peptide drugs.
While FDA scientists determined in 2023 that the drugs lack evidence of benefits and may pose safety risks, Kennedy is a self-professed "big fan" of the dubious drugs and has vowed to "end" FDA's "aggressive suppression" of them.
On Monday, the Food and Drug Administration updated its list of advisors who will review the peptides, adding nine new members—almost all of whom personally promote peptide use and/or have financial ties to wellness clinics that offer peptide treatments. The additions bring the total number of advisors to 13, making it easy for the new members to determine the outcome of upcoming meetings.Read full article

title: അമേരിക്ക-ഇറാൻ സമാധാന കരാർ എഫക്ട്, ഇന്ധനവില മാസങ്ങൾക്ക് ശേഷം കുറച്ച് യുഎഇ; പ്രവാസികൾക്കടക്കം വലിയ ആശ്വാസം
description: അമേരിക്ക-ഇറാൻ സമാധാന കരാറിനെ തുടർന്ന് യുഎഇയിൽ ഇന്ധനവിലയിൽ കാര്യമായ കുറവ് രേഖപ്പെടുത്തി. മാസങ്ങളായി തുടർന്ന വിലവർദ്ധനവിന് ശേഷമുള്ള ഈ തീരുമാനം പ്രവാസികൾ ഉൾപ്പെടെയുള്ളവർക്ക് വലിയ ആശ്വാസം നൽകുന്നു
content: <p>അബുദാബി: അമേരിക്ക - ഇറാൻ സമാധാന കരാറിന് പിന്നാലെ യു എ ഇ ഇന്ധനവില കുറച്ചു. മാസങ്ങളോളം തുടർച്ചയായ വർധനവിന് ശേഷമാണ് ഇത്. സൂപ്പർ 98 പെട്രോൾ 3.95 ദിർഹത്തിൽ നിന്ന് 3.40 ആയി താഴ്ന്നു. സ്പെഷ്യൽ 95 പെട്രോൾ 3.29 ദിർഹമായി കുറഞ്ഞു. നേരത്തെ ഇത് 3.83 ദിർഹമായിരുന്നു. ഇ പ്ലസ് 91 പെട്രോൾ 3.76 ദിർഹത്തിൽ നിന്ന് 3.21 ആയി കുറഞ്ഞു. ഡീസലിൽ കാര്യമായ കുറവുണ്ട്. 4.33 ദിർഹത്തിൽ നിന്ന് 3.6 ദിർഹമായി കുറഞ്ഞു. യുദ്ധത്തിന് പിന്നാലെ ഇന്ധനവില അറുപത് ശതമാനത്തോളം ഉയർന്നിരുന്നു. പ്രവാസികൾക്കുൾപ്പടെ വലിയ ആശ്വാസമാണ് തീരുമാനം.</p><h2><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് വാർത്തകൾ തത്സമയം കാണാം</strong></h2><p></p>

title: The Uddhav Meltdown Has A Bengal Template — And A Two-Thirds Trap
description: The decline of Shiv Sena (UBT) reflects a broader trend among regional parties in India. Major losses in elections, such as UBT's dwindling legislative strength and TMC's internal coup, reveal a pattern where parties, often centered around a single leader, become vulnerable.
content: The erosion of Shiv Sena (UBT) is not a Maharashtra-specific event. It is the second time in two months that a major regional party built around one leader has been hollowed out through the same legal mechanism — and the Bengal case shows where it ends. This is starting to look like a pattern, not a one-off.The defection of UBT MLC Sachin Ahir on Tuesday (June 30) is best read as confirmation of a trajectory, not an isolated setback. Ahir, a close Uddhav Thackeray aide whose Worli base overlaps Aaditya Thackeray's own constituency, joined Eknath Shinde's Shiv Sena and filed for Deputy Chairman of the Legislative Council. The Shinde camp calls it the second phase of "Operation Tiger" — the first targeting MPs, the second now aimed at MLAs and MLCs.The sharper comparison is not the Sena's own 2022 split but what happened to the Trinamool Congress weeks earlier. The two cases share a mechanism, a sequence and an adversary — which is what makes "the Bengal template" more than a rhetorical device.Same Date, Same MethodThe clearest sign of a shared pattern is the timing. On June 22, a faction removed Mamata Banerjee as TMC chairperson — described by insiders as an internal coup — allegedly ending her near three-decade hold over the party she founded in 1998. The same day in Mumbai, six of the nine MPs elected on the UBT symbol merged into Shinde's faction, cutting Uddhav's Lok Sabha strength to three.The method is statutory, not incidental. The six MPs held a two-thirds share of the party's parliamentary group — the exact threshold the anti-defection law requires for a bloc to merge without disqualification. Bengal ran on the same arithmetic: 58 of the 80 TMC MLAs elected in 2026, past two-thirds, signed a letter installing the expelled Ritabrata Banerjee as Leader of the Opposition, a figure the rebels now put at 64. Separately, around 20 of the TMC's 28 MPs have signalled a move toward the NDA. In both cases the Tenth Schedule's merger clause — drafted to deter defection — became the instrument that legalised it.  The Structural Cause: Parties That Survive On A FaceThe mechanism explains how, not why both parties proved so easy to dismantle. Parties organised around a single charismatic leader, with thin institutional scaffolding and no firm ideological core, rise and fall with the personal fortunes of their supremo. Both the TMC and the UBT fit: each was a vehicle for a face, not a platform for a programme."Traditional parties, just like independents or independent parties, also have an age limit. As per my understanding, the average age of parties is around 30 to 40 years. Once a party reaches this threshold, there are pressures on the party for survival," said political analyst Amitabh Tiwari."National parties can survive because of their ideological positions and strong presence across the country… These regional parties in India are, anyway, controlled by families. The family-controlling people hold them together. But once a party loses the respect that the family commands, the ranks decline because the leaders then feel the head of the party is not able to look at their roots," he added.On the UBT setback, Tiwari said: "Most of the regional parties are in their second or third stage — a different dynasty, sort of. Second or third stage. What happens in that stage is that a lot of people are compared to the original regional leaders — for example, Balasaheb. A lot of people are likened to Balasaheb, but it's not the same as Balasaheb. Because of the lack of charisma and lack of popularity among the leaders, there is also a rebellion against these new leaders."Political commentator Rashid Kidwai located the fault deeper than the statute. "The two-thirds merger provision is not the root cause; it is a mechanism that political actors have learnt to use with increasing sophistication. The deeper issue is that many Indian regional parties have become personality-centric formations rather than institutional organisations. When political authority, electoral appeal, or access to power weakens, legislators begin to view parties less as ideological homes and more as political vehicles. The Shiv Sena and NCP splits demonstrated that the battle is no longer merely about ideology or loyalty, but about who controls the name, symbol, inheritance, and political future. In contemporary politics, parties increasingly risk becoming temporary containers rather than enduring institutions."  The fragility stays dormant in victory and turns fatal in defeat. Once the verdict turns, the leader's value to ambitious legislators collapses and the two-thirds exit becomes self-preservation, not ideological rupture. That engine turned over in Bengal first.The Defeats Came Before The DefectionsIn both states, the electoral collapse preceded — and triggered — the desertions. The TMC was reduced to roughly 80 seats in the Assembly election declared on May 4, 2026, ending 15 years of rule and down from 215 in 2021. Mamata herself lost Bhabanipur to Suvendu Adhikari, sworn in on May 9 as Bengal's first BJP chief minister. Tellingly, the man now running Bengal came not from the BJP's own stable but from Mamata's — Adhikari, once a Nandigram-era loyalist, had crossed over citing alienation.The UBT's decline was slower but followed the same logic. Cut to 20 MLAs in 2024, the decisive blow came locally: in January 2026 Uddhav's reunion with cousin Raj Thackeray, after two decades, failed to move voters, and the Mahayuti crossed the majority mark in the BMC — ending the family's near three-decade hold over India's wealthiest civic body. A brand that can no longer carry its home city is one whose carriers begin to leave.Where The Erosion Now PointsThe bleed is spreading from Parliament into the Assembly. Maharashtra minister Gulabrao Patil claims "Operation Tiger 2.0" is underway and that more than 14 of the UBT's 20 MLAs could cross over; a group of UBT MLAs reportedly met Shinde during the monsoon session. The number is not arbitrary — 14 is exactly two-thirds of 20.This is a claim by an adversary, not an established fact, and the analysis turns on that. What is established is the MP merger, the Ahir defection and the BMC loss; what is asserted is the MLA exodus. But the structural exposure is real: the party sits six legislators from the same statutory erasure in the assembly it has already suffered in the Lok Sabha.Fadnavis said, "Uddhav ji did not introspect, and this is the consequence." Uddhav countered  that this was "Operation Devendra" — a plot to weaken Fadnavis before he could emerge as a PM contender — an allegation Fadnavis rejected.Is this, then, a repeatable playbook against any regional party that loses power? Kidwai sees a wider shift. "The developments in Maharashtra and West Bengal suggest a broader pattern in Indian politics where electoral competition increasingly shifts away from the voter and towards managing the political field itself. Whether through engineered splits, defections, legal manoeuvres, candidate withdrawals, or the use of smaller political formations as vehicles for realignment, the methods have become more systematic and sophisticated. This is not unique to one state, but reflects a larger transformation in Indian politics where parties with stronger organisational machinery, resources, and institutional leverage enjoy a structural advantage. The concern is not simply who deploys these tactics, but that political competition itself is increasingly being shaped before voters cast their ballots."Where The Templates DivergeFirst, motive. In Bengal, the rebels still profess loyalty to Mamata Banerjee even as they sideline her nephew Abhishek — making that revolt partly a succession fight. The UBT crisis has no such ambiguity: it is a straight migration toward power, with Uddhav still atop a shrinking party and Aaditya his undisputed heir.Second, baseline. Mamata fell from an office she had held for years; Uddhav has held none since 2022. His response is limited to what little is left to him — touring the rebel MPs' constituencies and insisting he leads the "original and only Shiv Sena" — while his party brands the defectors not rebels but "traitors" who were bought off.The outcome will be settled less by mobilisation than by adjudication. Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla is expected to rule on the defections in both parties before the monsoon session opens in the third week of July. For the TMC, a parallel fight over name and symbol is headed to the Election Commission and the courts. Those rulings — not the constituency tours — will decide whether either supremo keeps anything beyond a label.(The article has expert views from political commentators Amitabh Tiwari and Rashid Kidwai)

title: పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్ ఎగుమతులపై కేంద్రం కొత్త పన్ను
description: Petrol Diesel Export Duty: దేశీయ ఇంధన మార్కెట్లో చమురు నిల్వల కొరత ఏర్పడకుండా చూడటంతో పాటు అంతర్గతంగా పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్ సరఫరా వ్యవస్థను బలోపేతం చేసేందుకు...
content:
Petrol Diesel Export Duty: దేశీయ ఇంధన మార్కెట్లో చమురు నిల్వల కొరత ఏర్పడకుండా చూడటంతో పాటు అంతర్గతంగా పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్ సరఫరా వ్యవస్థను బలోపేతం చేసేందుకు కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం అత్యంత వ్యూహాత్మక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. భారతీయ చమురు శుద్ధి కర్మాగారాలు మరియు ప్రైవేట్ ఇంధన సంస్థలు దేశీయ అవసరాలను పక్కనబెట్టి, అంతర్జాతీయంగా వచ్చే భారీ లాభాల కోసం విదేశాలకు ఇంధనాన్ని తరలించకుండా నిలువరించేందుకు కేంద్ర ఆర్థిక మంత్రిత్వ శాఖ పెట్రోలియం ఉత్పత్తుల ఎగుమతులపై ప్రత్యేక అదనపు ఎక్సైజ్ డ్యూటీని (SAED – Special Additional Excise Duty) విధిస్తూ అధికారిక ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేసింది. దేశీయంగా చమురు లభ్యతను స్థిరీకరించేందుకు ఈ విండ్‌ఫాల్ పన్ను విధానాన్ని అత్యవసరంగా అమలు చేస్తున్నట్లు ప్రభుత్వం స్పష్టం చేసింది.



కేంద్ర రెవెన్యూ విభాగం వెల్లడించిన నివేదిక ప్రకారం.. నూతన పన్ను మార్గదర్శకాల ప్రకారం విదేశాలకు ఎగుమతి చేసే ప్రతి లీటరు పెట్రోల్‌పై రూ. 4 చొప్పున అదనపు సుంకం విధించారు. అలాగే రవాణా రంగానికి కీలకమైన డీజిల్ ఎగుమతులపై ప్రతి లీటరుకు రూ. 8.50 చొప్పున మరియు విమాన ఇంధనమైన ఏవియేషన్ టర్బైన్ ఫ్యూయల్ (ATF) ఎగుమతులపై ప్రతి లీటరుకు రూ. 7.50 చొప్పున ఈ ప్రత్యేక అదనపు ఎక్సైజ్ డ్యూటీని వర్తింపజేయనున్నారు. అంతర్జాతీయ మార్కెట్లో చమురు ధరల హెచ్చుతగ్గుల ఆధారంగా దేశీయ కంపెనీలు గడించే అదనపు లాభాలపై నియంత్రణ సాధించేందుకు ఈ పన్నుల విధింపు దోహదపడుతుందని ఆర్థిక నిపుణులు విశ్లేషిస్తున్నారు.



అయితే, భారతదేశ పొరుగు దేశాల ఇంధన భద్రతను మరియు ద్వైపాక్షిక వాణిజ్య సంబంధాలను దృష్టిలో ఉంచుకుని కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం ఈ పన్నుల విధింపులో కొన్ని కీలక దేశాలకు భారీ ఉపశమనం కల్పించింది. భారత్ నుండి మారిషస్, మాల్దీవ్స్, నేపాల్, భూటాన్, బంగ్లాదేశ్, మరియు శ్రీలంక వంటి పొరుగు దేశాలకు రవాణా చేసే పెట్రోలియం ఎగుమతులపై ఈ ప్రత్యేక అదనపు ఎక్సైజ్ సుంకాల నుండి పూర్తి మినహాయింపు (Tax Exemption) ఇచ్చారు. దక్షిణాసియా ప్రాంతీయ సహకార విధివిధానాల్లో భాగంగా ఆయా దేశాలకు నిరంతరాయంగా ఇంధన సరఫరా సాగేలా ఈ మినహాయింపులు ఇచ్చినట్లు అధికారులు తెలిపారు.



భారతదేశంలోని సామాన్య వాహనదారులపై ఈ నిర్ణయం వల్ల ఎలాంటి అదనపు భారం పడదని చమురు కంపెనీలు స్పష్టం చేశాయి. దేశీయంగా సాధారణ వినియోగదారులు కొనుగోలు చేసే పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్‌పై ప్రస్తుతం విధిస్తున్న సాధారణ ఎక్సైజ్ డ్యూటీ (Excise Duty) మరియు వ్యాట్ (VAT) నిర్మాణాల్లో ఎలాంటి మార్పులు లేవని, దేశీయ రిటైల్ బంకుల్లో పాత ధరలే కొనసాగుతాయని కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం ఈ సందర్భంగా ప్రజలకు స్పష్టమైన భరోసా ఇచ్చింది.

title: मुंबई लोकल की सुरक्षा पर संकट, RPF-GRP में स्टाफ की है भारी कमी, दोनों में हैं 2,559 पद पर रिक्तियां
description: Mumbai Local RPF GRP Vacancies: मुंबई लोकल में 75 लाख यात्रियों की सुरक्षा पर संकट गहरा रहा है। आरपीएफ और जीआरपी में 2,559 पद खाली होने से गश्त, महिला सुरक्षा और त्वरित कार्रवाई प्रभावित हो रही है।
content:
Mumbai Local RPF GRP Vacancies Passenger Security: मुंबई लोकल में सफर करने वाले करीब 75 लाख यात्रियों की सुरक्षा पर संकट बढ़ता जा रहा है, क्योंकि मुंबई की लाइफलाइन बेहद सीमित बल के भरोसे चल रही है। सुरक्षा का जिम्मा संभालने वाली आरपीएफ और जीआरपी में स्टाफ की भारी कमी है।
दोनों बलों को मिलाकर कुल 2,559 पद रिक्त पड़े हैं। स्थिति की गंभीरता का अंदाजा इसी बात से लगाया जा सकता है कि आरपीएफ का हर चौथा पद खाली है, जिससे सुरक्षा व्यवस्था पर भारी दबाव बन रहा है।
इतनी हैं खाली पदों की संख्या
मध्य और पश्चिम रेलवे के मुंबई मंडल में आरपीएफ के कुल मंजूर पद 7,042 हैं। इनमें से 5,226 कर्मी कार्यरत हैं, जबकि 1,816 पद रिक्त हैं। इस तरह करीब हर चौथा पद खाली है। मध्य रेलवे में 5,148 मंजूर पदों में 3,852 कर्मचारी कार्यरत हैं और 1,296 पद खाली हैं। वहीं पश्चिम रेलवे में 1,894 मंजूर पदों में 1,374 कर्मी कार्यरत हैं, जबकि 520 पद रिक्त हैं।
ऐसे में मुंबई मंडल में आरपीएफ के 25.8 प्रतिशत और जीआरपी के 17.5 प्रतिशत पद खाली होने का खुलासा हुआ है। सूत्रों के अनुसार इसका असर भीड़भाड़ के समय गश्त, महिला सुरक्षा, संदिग्धों पर निगरानी और रेलवे परिसरों की सुरक्षा पर पड़ रहा है।
यह भी पढ़ेः-  महाराष्ट्र में 11 करोड़ वृक्षारोपण का लक्ष्य, मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस बोले- आधुनिक तकनीक से सफल होगा यह अभियान 
प्रभावित हो रही है त्वरित कार्रवाई
जीआरपी भी कर्मियों की कमी से जूझ रही है। 4,243 मंजूर पदों में 743 रिक्त हैं। भर्ती प्रक्रिया पूरी होने के बावजूद नए कर्मियों का प्रशिक्षण जारी है, जिससे मौजूदा कर्मियों को कई जगह 12 घंटे से अधिक ड्यूटी करनी पड़ रही है। इस बीच चर्चगेट-बोरीवली और चर्चगेट-नालासोपारा लोकल में मामूली विवाद के दौरान दो हत्याओं ने सुरक्षा व्यवस्था पर सवाल खड़े कर दिए हैं।
स्टाफ की कमी के कारण गश्त, निगरानी और शिकायतों पर त्वरित कार्रवाई प्रभावित हो रही है। फिलहाल, महाराष्ट्र सुरक्षा बल और होमगार्ड की मदद ली जा रही है, लेकिन कानूनी अधिकार सीमित होने से यात्रियों की सुरक्षा के लिए रिक्त पद जल्द भरने की मांग तेज हो गई है।

Veteran Marathi theatre legend Vijaya Mehta passes away at 91
description: Veteran theatre director, actor and producer Vijaya Mehta, one of the most influential figures in modern Marathi theatre, passed away on Tuesday at the age of 91. She breathed her last at her residence, leaving behind a rich legacy that transformed the landscape of Indian theatre.

title: TC కోసం టీచర్‌పై విద్యార్థి కత్తితో దాడి
description: Student Attacks Teacher: మహారాష్ట్రలోని ఛత్రపతి శంభాజీనగర్ (గతంలో ఔరంగాబాద్) నగరంలో విద్యారంగాన్ని నివ్వెరపరిచే అత్యంత భయంకరమైన ఘాతుకం చోటుచేసుకుంది. పాఠశాల పరిపాలన విభాగంలో ట్రాన్స్‌ఫర్ సర్టిఫికెట్...
content:
Student Attacks Teacher: మహారాష్ట్రలోని ఛత్రపతి శంభాజీనగర్ (గతంలో ఔరంగాబాద్) నగరంలో విద్యారంగాన్ని నివ్వెరపరిచే అత్యంత భయంకరమైన ఘాతుకం చోటుచేసుకుంది. పాఠశాల పరిపాలన విభాగంలో ట్రాన్స్‌ఫర్ సర్టిఫికెట్ (TC) జారీ చేసే విషయమై తలెత్తిన వివాదంలో ఓ విద్యార్థి తన ఉపాధ్యాయుడిపై కత్తితో ప్రాణాంతక దాడికి తెగబడ్డాడు. నగరంలోని ప్రముఖ ‘లిటిల్ ఫ్లవర్ హైస్కూల్’ (Little Flower School Sambhajinagar) ప్రిన్సిపల్ ఛాంబర్‌లో జరిగిన ఈ ఘోర దాడికి సంబంధించిన సిసిటివి (CCTV) దృశ్యాలు ప్రస్తుతం సోషల్ మీడియా ప్లాట్‌ఫామ్స్‌లో వైరల్‌గా మారి తీవ్ర సంచలనం సృష్టిస్తున్నాయి.



పాఠశాల యాజమాన్యం మరియు పోలీసులు వెల్లడించిన వివరాల ప్రకారం.. సదరు విద్యార్థి తన టీసీ నిమిత్తం గత కొన్ని రోజులుగా స్కూల్ చుట్టూ తిరుగుతున్నాడు.



ప్రిన్సిపల్ ఛాంబర్‌లోనే దాడి – గదిలో బంధించి ఘాతుకం



సోమవారం నాడు పాఠశాల కార్యాలయంలో లిటిల్ ఫ్లవర్ స్కూల్ ప్రిన్సిపల్ మరియు సదరు బాధితుడైన క్లాస్ టీచర్ కూర్చుని అధికారిక ఫైళ్లపై చర్చిస్తున్నారు. అదే సమయంలో టీసీ విషయమై మాట్లాడేందుకు సదరు విద్యార్థి ఛాంబర్‌లోకి ప్రవేశించాడు. సర్టిఫికెట్ జారీలో నిబంధనల ప్రకారం కొంత ఆలస్యమవుతుందని ఉపాధ్యాయులు చెబుతుండగా, తీవ్ర ఆగ్రహానికి లోనైన ఆ విద్యార్థి.. తన బ్యాగులో ముందస్తు ప్రణాళికతో దాచి ఉంచిన పదునైన కత్తిని ఒక్కసారిగా బయటకు తీశాడు.



ప్రిన్సిపల్ కళ్లెదుటే భయానక వాతావరణాన్ని సృష్టిస్తూ, క్లాస్ టీచర్‌పై విచక్షణారహితంగా దాడి చేసి కత్తితో పొడిచాడు. ఊహించని ఈ పరిణామానికి షాక్‌కు గురైన ప్రిన్సిపల్ నిలువరించే ప్రయత్నం చేయగా, సదరు విద్యార్థి ప్రిన్సిపల్‌ను బలంగా నెట్టివేసి ఛాంబర్ బయటకు పంపించివేసాడు. ఆ వెంటనే లోపల ఎవరూ రాకుండా గది తలుపులకు గడియ పెట్టి (డోర్ లాక్ చేసి) గాయపడిన టీచర్‌ను గదిలోనే బంధించడం సిసిటివి వీడియోలో స్పష్టంగా కనిపిస్తోంది.



Student Attacks Teacher: ఉపాధ్యాయుని పరిస్థితి విషమం – విద్యార్థి అరెస్ట్



స్కూల్ కారిడార్‌లో ఉన్న మిగతా సిబ్బంది, ఉపాధ్యాయులు భయాందోళనల మధ్య ఛాంబర్ తలుపులు బద్దలుకొట్టి లోపలికి వెళ్లారు. తీవ్ర రక్తస్రావంతో అపస్మారక స్థితిలోకి వెళ్లిన సదరు ఉపాధ్యాయుడిని చికిత్స నిమిత్తం తక్షణమే స్థానిక కార్పొరేట్ ఆసుపత్రికి తరలించారు. ప్రస్తుతం ఐసీయూలో చికిత్స పొందుతున్న సదరు టీచర్ పరిస్థితి అత్యంత విషమంగా ఉన్నట్లు వైద్యులు వెల్లడించారు.







ఈ దారుణ ఘటనపై సమాచారం అందుకున్న శంభాజీనగర్ సిటీ పోలీసులు హుటాహుటిన లిటిల్ ఫ్లవర్ స్కూల్‌కు చేరుకున్నారు. దాడికి పాల్పడి పారిపోయేందుకు ప్రయత్నించిన సదరు విద్యార్థిని పోలీసులు వెంబడించి అదుపులోకి తీసుకున్నారు. అతడిపై హత్యాయత్నం (Attempt to Murder) సహా వివిధ సెక్షన్ల కింద క్రిమినల్ కేసులు నమోదు చేసి అరెస్ట్ చేశారు. స్కూల్ సిసిటివి ఫుటేజీని స్వాధీనం చేసుకున్న పోలీసులు.. ఈ దాడి వెనుక కేవలం టీసీ వివాదమే ఉందా లేక ఉపాధ్యాయునితో ఇతర వ్యక్తిగత కక్షలు ఏమైనా ఉన్నాయా అనే కోణంలో ముమ్మర దర్యాప్తు జరుపుతున్నారు. పట్టపగలు స్కూల్ లోపలే కత్తితో దాడి జరగడంపై విద్యార్థుల తల్లిదండ్రులు తీవ్ర ఆందోళన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు.

title: ജൂലൈ ആദ്യ ദിനം തീവ്രമഴ, 2 ജില്ലകളിൽ വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങൾക്ക് അവധി, ഓറഞ്ച് അലർട്ട്; നാളെ 7 ജില്ലകളിൽ യെല്ലോ അലർട്ട്, മത്സ്യബന്ധനത്തിന് വിലക്ക്
description: സംസ്ഥാനത്ത് ജൂലൈ ആദ്യ ദിനം തീവ്ര മഴയ്ക്ക് സാധ്യതയുള്ളതിനാൽ കണ്ണൂർ, കാസർഗോഡ് ജില്ലകളിലെ വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങൾക്ക് അവധി പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു. നാളെ ഈ ജില്ലകളിൽ ഓറഞ്ച് അലർട്ടും മറ്റ് 7 ജില്ലകളിൽ യെല്ലോ അലർട്ടും നിലവിലുണ്ട്
content: <p>കണ്ണൂർ: സംസ്ഥാനത്തെ വടക്കൻ ജില്ലകളിൽ ജൂലൈ ആദ്യ ദിനം തീവ്ര മഴയ്ക്ക് സാധ്യത. കണ്ണൂർ, കാസർഗോഡ് ജില്ലകളിലാണ് നാളെ അതിശക്ത മഴക്ക് സാധ്യത. ഈ ജില്ലകളിൽ ഓറഞ്ച് അലർട്ട് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നതിനാൽ വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങൾക്ക് നാളെ അവധി പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. രണ്ട് ജില്ലകളിലും കോളേജുകൾക്കടക്കമാണ് അവധി. ​മുൻകൂട്ടി നിശ്ചയിച്ച സർവകലാശാല/ പൊതു പരീക്ഷകൾക്കും അഭിമുഖങ്ങൾക്കും മാറ്റമുണ്ടായിരിക്കില്ല. ഒറ്റപ്പെട്ടയിടങ്ങളിൽ അതിശക്തമായ മഴയ്ക്കുള്ള സാധ്യതയാണ് പ്രവചിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. 24 മണിക്കൂറിൽ 204.4 എം എം വരെ മഴ ലഭിക്കാവുന്ന സാഹചര്യമാണുള്ളത്. ആലപ്പുഴ, എറണാകുളം, തൃശ്ശൂർ, മലപ്പുറം, പാലക്കാട്, കോഴിക്കോട്, വയനാട് എന്നീ 7 ജില്ലകളിൽ യെല്ലോ അലർട്ടും പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. മഴയ്ക്കൊപ്പം ഇടിമിന്നലിനും ശക്തമായ കാറ്റിനും സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്. ജൂലൈ 4 വരെ നിലവിൽ സംസ്ഥാനത്ത് വിവിധ ജില്ലകളിൽ യെല്ലോ അലർട്ട് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. കാലാവസ്ഥ മോശമായതിനാൽ കേരള തീരത്ത് മത്സ്യബന്ധനത്തിനേർപ്പെടുത്തിയ വിലക്ക് തുടരും.</p><h2><strong>ഓറഞ്ച് അലർട്ട്</strong></h2><p>01/ 07/ 2026 : കണ്ണൂർ, കാസർകോട് എന്നീ ജില്ലകളിൽ കേന്ദ്ര കാലാവസ്ഥ വകുപ്പ് ഓറഞ്ച് അലർട്ട് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നു. ഒറ്റപ്പെട്ടയിടങ്ങളിൽ അതിശക്തമായ മഴയ്ക്കുള്ള സാധ്യതയാണ് പ്രവചിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. 24 മണിക്കൂറിൽ 115.6 mm മുതൽ 204.4 mm വരെ മഴ ലഭിക്കുമെന്നാണ് അതിശക്തമായ മഴ (Very Heavy Rainfall) എന്നത് കൊണ്ട് കേന്ദ്ര കാലാവസ്ഥ വകുപ്പ് അർത്ഥമാക്കുന്നത്. ഇടിമിന്നലോടു കൂടിയ മഴയാണ് പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നത്.</p><h2><strong>മഞ്ഞ അലർട്ട്</strong></h2><p>01/07/2026: ആലപ്പുഴ, എറണാകുളം, തൃശ്ശൂർ, പാലക്കാട്, മലപ്പുറം, കോഴിക്കോട്, വയനാട്</p><p>02/07/2026: കോഴിക്കോട്, കണ്ണൂർ, കാസർകോട്</p><p>03/07/2026: ഇടുക്കി, എറണാകുളം, തൃശ്ശൂർ, മലപ്പുറം, കോഴിക്കോട്, കണ്ണൂർ, കാസർകോട്</p><p>04/07/2026: പത്തനംതിട്ട, കോട്ടയം, ഇടുക്കി, എറണാകുളം, തൃശ്ശൂർ, മലപ്പുറം, കോഴിക്കോട്, കണ്ണൂർ, കാസർകോട് എന്നീ ജില്ലകളിൽ കേന്ദ്ര കാലാവസ്ഥ വകുപ്പ് മഞ്ഞ അലർട്ട് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നു. ഒറ്റപ്പെട്ട ശക്തമായ മഴയ്ക്കുള്ള സാധ്യതയാണ് പ്രവചിക്കപ്പെട്ടിരിക്കുന്നത്. 24 മണിക്കൂറിൽ 64.5 മില്ലിമീറ്ററിൽ മുതൽ 115.5 മില്ലിമീറ്റർ വരെ മഴ ലഭിക്കുന്ന സാഹചര്യത്തെയാണ് ശക്തമായ മഴ (ISOL H) എന്നത് കൊണ്ട് കേന്ദ്ര കാലാവസ്ഥ വകുപ്പ് അർത്ഥമാക്കുന്നത്. ഇടിമിന്നലോടു കൂടിയ മഴയാണ് പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p></p>

title: ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ ପୁଣି ମିଳିବନି ସୁଯୋଗ? ଡେବ୍ୟୁକୁ ନେଇ ଏ କ’ଣ କହିଦେଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୩୦।୬: ଆୟରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷ ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍‌ରେ ଆଶ୍ଚର୍ଯ୍ୟଜନକ ପରାଜୟ ପରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ଦଳର ବ୍ୟାଟିଂ ଲାଇନ୍-ଅପ୍‌କୁ ନେଇ ଅନେକ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନବାଚୀ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି। ବିଶେଷ କରି ଚମତ୍କାର ଫର୍ମରେ ଥିବା ଯୁବ ବ୍ୟାଟର ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ହେଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ସୁଯୋଗ ନ ମିଳିବାକୁ ନେଇ ସମାଲୋଚନା ଜୋର ଧରିଛି। ଏଭଳି ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ବୁଧବାର (୧ ଜୁଲାଇ)ଠାରୁ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷରେ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବାକୁ ଥିବା ଟି-୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍‌ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ବୈଭବଙ୍କ ଡେବ୍ୟୁକୁ ନେଇ ପୁଣି ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚା […]
The post ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ ପୁଣି ମିଳିବନି ସୁଯୋଗ? ଡେବ୍ୟୁକୁ ନେଇ ଏ କ’ଣ କହିଦେଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: മലപ്പുറം പൊലീസ് മേധാവിക്ക് ലഭിച്ച ആ നിർണായക വിവരം, കാത്തിരുന്നു, കയ്യോടെ പൊക്കിയത് ഓട്ടോയിലെത്തിയ സക്കീർ ഹുസൈനെ, എംഡിഎംഎയും പിടിച്ചു
description: ഓപറേഷന്‍ തൂഫാന്റെ ഭാഗമായി കൊളത്തൂര്‍ പൊലീസും ഡാന്‍സാഫ് സ്‌ക്വാഡും നടത്തിയ പരിശോധനയില്‍ 97.60 ഗ്രാം എം.ഡി.എം.എയുമായി തിരൂര്‍ സ്വദേശി സക്കീര്‍ ഹുസൈന്‍ പിടിയിലായി.
content: <p><strong>മലപ്പുറം</strong>: ഓപറേഷന്‍ തൂഫാന്റെ ഭാഗമായി കൊളത്തൂര്‍ പൊലീസും ഡാന്‍സാഫ് സ്‌ക്വാഡും നടത്തിയ പരിശോധനയില്‍ വില്‍പനക്കെത്തിച്ച 97.60 ഗ്രാം എം.ഡി.എം.എയുമായി തിരൂര്‍ പൊന്മുണ്ടം സ്വദേശി പിടിയില്‍. പൊന്മുണ്ടം ആദൃശ്ശേരി പാട്ടുരാട്ട് വീട്ടില്‍ സക്കീര്‍ ഹുസൈനെയാണ് (43) ഞായറാഴ്ച രാത്രി 8.30 ഓടെ പെരിന്തല്‍മണ്ണ ഡാന്‍സാഫ് ഇന്‍സ്‌പെക്ടര്‍ കൂടിയായ സുമേഷ് സുധാകരന്റെ നേതൃത്വത്തില്‍ അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്തത്. &nbsp;</p><p>ജില്ലാ പൊലീസ് മേധാവിക്ക് ലഭിച്ച രഹസ്യ വിവരത്തിന്റെ അടിസ്ഥാനത്തില്‍ മലപ്പുറം നാര്‍ക്കോട്ടിക്‌ സെല്‍ ഡിവൈഎസ്പി എന്‍.ഒ. സിബി, പെരിന്തല്‍മണ്ണ ഡി വൈ.എസ്.പി. എം.ബി. ലത്തീഫ് എന്നിവരുടെ നേതൃത്വത്തില്‍ കൊളത്തൂര്‍ പൊലീസും ഡാന്‍സാഫ് സംഘവും രഹസ്യനിരീക്ഷണം നടത്തി വരികയായിരുന്നു. &nbsp;</p><p>കൊളത്തുര്‍ പലകപ്പറമ്പ് പാങ്ങ് റോഡില്‍ നടത്തിയ പരിശോധനയിലാണ് ഓട്ടോയില്‍ കടത്തിയ എം.ഡി.എം.എയുമായി സക്കീര്‍ ഹുസൈന്‍ പിടിയിലായത്. തിരൂര്‍, കോട്ടക്കല്‍ ഭാഗങ്ങള്‍ കേന്ദ്രീകരിച്ച് എം.ഡി. എം.എ ചെറിയ പാക്കറ്റുകളിലാക്കി വില്‍പന നടത്തുന്ന കണ്ണിയാണെന്ന് പൊലീസ് പറഞ്ഞു. കഴിഞ്ഞ വര്‍ഷം എം.ഡി.എം.എയുമായി പിടിയിലായി രണ്ടുമാസം ജയിലില്‍ കിടന്ന് ജാമ്യത്തില്‍ ഇറങ്ങിയതാണ്.</p><p>കൊളത്തൂര്‍ ഇന്‍സ്‌പെക്ടര്‍ എം. ബിജു, എസ്.സി.പി.ഒമാരായ മനോജ് കുമാര്‍, ദിനേശ്, പ്രഫുല്‍, പ്രശാന്ത്, കൃഷ്ണകുമാര്‍, സുരേന്ദ്ര ബാബു എന്നിവരും കൊളത്തൂര്‍ പൊലീസും പൊലീസ് സംഘത്തിലുണ്ടായിരുന്നു. മലപ്പുറം പൊലീ സ് ഇന്‍സ്‌പെക്ടര്‍ ഹരീഷിന്റെ സാന്നിധ്യത്തിലായിരുന്നു പരിശോധന. പ്രതിയെ റിമാന്‍ഡ് ചെയ്തു. &nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Magicbricks strengthens its market leadership with 8 million+ monthly unique visitors, delivering unmatched visibility and high-intent leads
description: Magicbricks crossed 8 million monthly unique visitors in May 2026, leading India's online real estate platforms, according to comScore, strengthening its position as the preferred destination for property discovery and lead generation.
content: Magicbricks, India's leading real estate platform, has further cemented its leadership position by crossing 8 million monthly unique visitors, according to comScore (May 2026). The latest industry data places Magicbricks ahead of key competitors, reaffirming its position as the preferred digital destination for property buyers, sellers, developers, and channel partners across the country.The latest traffic figures highlight Magicbricks' clear leadership over other major real estate platforms, with 99acres recording 7.6 million monthly unique visitors, NoBroker at 6.1 million, and Housing.com at 5.6 million.The milestone reinforces Magicbricks' commitment to delivering maximum digital visibility and superior lead generation opportunities for its partners in an increasingly competitive real estate market.Driving better business outcomesAs India's property market continues its rapid digital transformation, online visibility has become one of the most critical factors influencing property discovery and buyer engagement. Higher platform traffic translates directly into increased property exposure, stronger brand recall, and access to a larger pool of high-intent homebuyers.With more than 8 million monthly unique visitors, Magicbricks enables developers, brokers, and property owners to reach a broader audience while generating quality enquiries that convert into business opportunities.Platform built for growthMagicbricks has consistently invested in technology, AI-driven recommendations, verified property listings, market intelligence, and consumer-first innovations to simplify the property buying and selling journey. These capabilities continue to strengthen consumer trust while helping real estate businesses maximize their marketing investments.The platform's growing audience reflects increasing consumer confidence in its ability to provide authentic listings, data-driven insights, and seamless property discovery experiences.More traffic, more visibility, more high-intent leadsThe latest rankings underscore a simple but powerful value proposition: greater consumer traffic results in greater property visibility, which ultimately leads to more qualified buyer enquiries.As India's real estate sector continues to evolve, Magicbricks remains focused on empowering industry stakeholders with the scale, technology, and reach needed to accelerate business growth.

title: WhatsApp rolls out username feature; not all users are happy
description: On June 29, WhatsApp introduced a new feature that enables users to reserve usernames for themselves, similar to what Telegram, another messaging app, launched in 2014. The WhatsApp feature will be rolled out over the coming months, but users can reserve usernames of their choice from this week; they will be notified once the feature becomes available in their country. The app will provide a username generator to help users—there are 3 billion of globally—make a pick. The feature will help creators, small businesses and organisations, who need to maintain a consistent presence online, claim their existing Instagram or Facebook username on WhatsApp.The Meta-owned messaging app said in its blog post on June 29 that this feature is a step towards increased privacy for users: “Usernames are our latest step to make WhatsApp even more private. There's no directory to browse and no suggestions—people will need to know your exact username to contact you for the first time. To help control who can reach you on WhatsApp with your username, we've built an optional username key that others will need to know to message you.”Users can choose to enable the feature if they want to keep their phone numbers private. At present, anyone who has your phone number can contact you on WhatsApp, but if you have enabled the new feature, they will need to know your username to contact you and will not be able to see your phone number. If you have already saved the person’s phone number, you will continue to see the name under which you saved that number.Your username will appear across direct messages, group chats and calls, and will be displayed with an @ symbol to distinguish it from a display name or phone number. To make sharing easier, WhatsApp will allow users to generate a QR code or a shareable link that directs others to their username. The feature is available on mobile devices and not on WhatsApp Web or Desktop.According to WhatsApp, the username should be between three and 35 characters long, can contain lowercase letters, digits, and special characters like underscores and periods. It cannot be a string of numbers only, it must be unique and can’t contain restricted words or phrases. Users can create, change or delete their username at any time, however, there will be a limit to the number of changes; previous usernames will become available to others after 14 days. Usernames can be transferred to new phone numbers.Also Read: WhatsApp Lawsuit Explained: Privacy Claims, Message Access and India’s DPDP ActWhatsApp will also offer an optional username key, which, when enabled, will require the other person to use both the username and the key to contact you. Existing contacts, people who have already chatted with, members of shared groups, those who have scanned your QR code, or anyone the user has messaged first will not need the key. The key is generated by WhatsApp and can be changed, regenerated or removed at any time. Enabling the feature will not affect existing conversations.The username feature has been announced days after Kunal Shah was announced as the new global head of WhatsApp, as the company aims to monetise its presence in India, where it has 500 million users. The broader vision is to transform WhatsApp into a ‘super app’ offering a wider range of services.“Timing is everything. Joined WhatsApp early enough to claim my username before we release this to the world. Time to get yours. A more private way to connect. Coming soon to your WhatsApp,” wrote Shah on X.In response to Shah’s post, Telegram wrote on X, “October 2014, is that you?”, while adding a link to its blog post from 12 years ago when it had rolled out the same feature.Everyone, however, is not as excited about the new feature. Entrepreneur and author Ankur Warikoo raised a red flag, saying scammers and fraudsters can create usernames that appear familiar and deceive users. “In a country such as India, this could be a disaster, if the right anti-abuse systems are not set up by WhatsApp,” he wrote on X.Jasveer Singh, CEO of KnotDating, a matrimony site, wrote on X, “WhatsApp just launched usernames. My first thought wasn't privacy - it was scams”, while Vijay Shekhar Sharma, founder and CEO of Paytm, wrote, “Soon you will have verified username on WhatsApp, and then unverified similar-sounding usernames… which in turn will…”WhatsApp has not mentioned if and how the username feature will be integrated with WhatsApp Payments.

title: మెదక్‌లో భూభారతి రీసర్వే ప్రారంభం
description: Medak Bhoobharathi Land Resurvey: గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల్లో దశాబ్దాలుగా నలుగుతున్న భూ సమస్యలకు శాశ్వత పరిష్కారం చూపి, రైతులకు పక్కాగా డిజిటల్ భూ హక్కులు కల్పించడమే లక్ష్యంగా...
content:
Medak Bhoobharathi Land Resurvey: గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల్లో దశాబ్దాలుగా నలుగుతున్న భూ సమస్యలకు శాశ్వత పరిష్కారం చూపి, రైతులకు పక్కాగా డిజిటల్ భూ హక్కులు కల్పించడమే లక్ష్యంగా ‘భూభారతి’ భూముల రీసర్వే (Bhoobharathi Land Resurvey) కార్యక్రమాన్ని జిల్లాలో ప్రతిష్టాత్మకంగా నిర్వహిస్తున్నట్లు మెదక్ జిల్లా కలెక్టర్ శ్రీమతి ప్రతిమా సింగ్ ఐఏఎస్ (Collector Pratima Singh IAS) తెలిపారు. మంగళవారం నాడు శివంపేట మండలం పరిధిలోని బీక్యాతాండాలో ల్యాండ్ సర్వే డిపార్ట్‌మెంట్ ఆధ్వర్యంలో ఏర్పాటు చేసిన ‘భూభారతి భూముల రీసర్వే గ్రామసభ’ (Gramasabha) ప్రత్యేక కార్యక్రమంలో అదనపు కలెక్టర్, ఆర్డీవో, సర్వే శాఖ ఏడీ మరియు స్థానిక సర్పంచ్‌లతో కలిసి కలెక్టర్ ప్రత్యక్షంగా పాల్గొన్నారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా గ్రామస్తులు, రైతులతో ముఖాముఖి మాట్లాడి భూ నక్షలు, సరిహద్దు వివాదాలపై ఆరా తీశారు.



ఈ సందర్భంగా జిల్లా కలెక్టర్ ప్రతిమా సింగ్ మాట్లాడుతూ.. శివంపేట మండలంలో చివరిసారిగా బ్రిటీష్ కాలం నాటి నిజాం పాలనలో, అంటే దాదాపు 1946వ సంవత్సరంలో భూ రీసర్వే జరిగిందని గుర్తుచేశారు.



క్రయవిక్రయాల్లో మ్యాపుల అప్‌డేషన్ – ప్రతి కమతానికి ‘భూధార్’



గడిచిన 80 ఏళ్లుగా భూమి క్రయవిక్రయాలు (భూముల అమ్మకాలు, కొనుగోళ్లు), వారసత్వ బదలాయింపులు విస్తృతంగా జరిగినప్పటికీ.. దానికి అనుగుణంగా రెవెన్యూ రికార్డుల్లో అధికారిక భూ మ్యాపులు (Maps) అప్‌డేట్ కాకపోవడం వల్లే ప్రస్తుతం క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో అపరిమితమైన భూ వివాదాలు, సరిహద్దు తగాదాలు తలెత్తుతున్నాయని కలెక్టర్ విశ్లేషించారు. గ్రామాల్లోని భూ నక్షల్లో ఉన్న సాంకేతిక లోపాలను క్షుణ్ణంగా పరిశీలించి, వాటిని డిజిటల్ పద్ధతిలో సవరించేందుకే ఈ ప్రత్యేక గ్రామసభలను నిర్వహిస్తున్నామన్నారు. ఆధునిక డ్రోన్ టెక్నాలజీ మరియు ఈటీఎస్ (ETS) యంత్రాల ద్వారా సాగుతున్న ఈ భూ రీసర్వే కార్యక్రమాన్ని అత్యంత పారదర్శకంగా అమలు చేసి, ప్రతి భూ కమతానికి (Land Parcel) సంబంధించిన అక్షాంశాలు, రేఖాంశాల ఆధారంగా ఆన్‌లైన్ డిజిటలైజేషన్ పూర్తి చేస్తామని స్పష్టం చేశారు. భవిష్యత్తులో ఎలాంటి ల్యాండ్ డిస్ప్యూట్స్ లేకుండా ప్రతి భూమికి విశిష్ట గుర్తింపు సంఖ్యతో కూడిన ‘భూధార్’ (Bhoodhaar) కార్డును అందజేయడం జరుగుతుందని, తద్వారా భూమికి గరిష్ట భద్రత లభిస్తుందని వివరించారు.







Medak Bhoobharathi Land Resurvey: శాశ్వత భూ పరిష్కారమే ధ్యేయం – అదనపు కలెక్టర్ నగేష్



అనంతరం జిల్లా అదనపు కలెక్టర్ నగేష్ మాట్లాడుతూ.. తరతరాలుగా రైతులు కోర్టులు, రెవెన్యూ ఆఫీసుల చుట్టూ తిరగాల్సిన అవస్థలు లేకుండా, శాశ్వత ప్రాతిపదికన భూ సమస్యల పరిష్కారం కోసమే ప్రభుత్వం ఈ అంతర్జాతీయ స్థాయి భూ రీసర్వే కార్యక్రమాన్ని నిర్వహిస్తోందని, దీనిని రైతులంతా సద్వినియోగం చేసుకోవాలని కోరారు. రీసర్వే సమయంలో రైతులు తమ భూమి వద్దే ఉండి సరిహద్దులను సరిచూసుకోవాలని సూచించారు.



శివంపేట మండలంలో వేడి పెంచిన ఈ చారిత్రాత్మక గ్రామసభ కార్యక్రమంలో జిల్లా ల్యాండ్ సర్వే అండ్ లాండ్ రికార్డ్స్ జిల్లా అధికారి (AD Survey) ఎ. కిషన్, స్థానిక మున్సిపల్ ఆర్డీవో, ఎంపీడీవో, బీక్యాతాండా గ్రామ సర్పంచ్, రెవెన్యూ ఇన్‌స్పెక్టర్లు, విలేజ్ రెవెన్యూ అధికారులు, వందలాది మంది స్థానిక రైతులు, గిరిజన పెద్దలు పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: Ayodhya Ram Temple Trust Calls Urgent Meeting Amid Donation Theft Probe
description: The Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust advanced the July 11 meeting to July 6 to address the ongoing investigation into the alleged theft of Ayodhya Ram Temple donations.
content: Amid the ongoing probe into the Ayodhya Ram Temple donations theft case, the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust on Tuesday called for an urgent gathering of its members as it has advanced its next meeting to July 6 from the previously scheduled July 11 meet. According to sources, the meeting is likely to discuss key decisions on the fate of its former general secretary Champat Rai and Trust member Anil Mishra as the controversy over alleged donation irregularities is mounting troubles for the Trust. Notably, Rai and Mishra have already resigned and it is speculated that the possibility of their resignations being accepted is very "high".All members of the Trust have been asked to remain available for the meeting, which is likely to focus on leadership changes. Additionally, measures to strengthen transparency in the management of temple affairs is also likely to be discussed in the meeting.Emergency Meet: What's Likely To Be Discussed?Champat Rai, a key functionary of the Trust, submitted his resignation, and Anil Mishra resigned last week. If the resignations of both trustees are accepted, three posts in the Trust will fall vacant. One post has been vacant for almost a year due to the demise of Bimlendra Mohan Pratap Mishra (a member).Trust Chairman Mahant Nrityagopaldas, member K Parasaran, along with some other trustees, are not active due to health and old age. In such a situation, if the Trust is restructured, new names may also be considered in place of these trustees during the meeting, news agency PTI reported citing sources.Meanwhile, if the central government appointed a CEO in the Trust, the by-laws of the Trust will first have to be changed. Legal experts suggest that without changing the Trust's rulebook, a CEO cannot be appointed.Notably, the name of Ram Mandir Construction Committee Chairman Nripendra Mishra was already being discussed for the post of CEO. Retired IAS officer Yogeshwar Ram Mishra's name is also making the rounds for the CEO's post.Temple Trust On Rai And Mishra’s ResignationsOn Saturday, the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust had confirmed that Champat Rai and member Anil Mishra had resigned from their posts, and assured that a fair inquiry would be conducted into allegations related to Ram temple donations.The resignations came against the backdrop of an alleged donation embezzlement case at the Ram Mandir, which surfaced on June 7. Following a request from the Trust, the Uttar Pradesh government set up a Special Investigation Team (SIT) on June 13.

title: महाराष्ट्र में 11 करोड़ वृक्षारोपण का लक्ष्य, मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस बोले- आधुनिक तकनीक से सफल होगा यह अभियान
description: Maharashtra Tree Plantation: सरकार ने 11 करोड़ वृक्षारोपण का लक्ष्य तय किया। मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने ग्राम स्तर पर नियोजन, ड्रोन, जीआईएस और पीपीपी मॉडल से अभियान तेज करने के निर्देश दिए।
content:
Maharashtra Tree Plantation Drive: राज्य सरकार ने इस वर्ष 11 करोड़ वृक्ष लगाने का महत्वाकांक्षी लक्ष्य निर्धारित किया है, जिसे पूरा करने के लिए मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने प्रभावी नियोजन और आधुनिक तकनीक के उपयोग पर जोर दिया है। इस लक्ष्य को हासिल करने के लिए सभी सरकारी विभागों और स्थानीय निकायों को आपसी समन्वय से काम करने के निर्देश दिए गए हैं।
ग्राम स्तर पर बनेगी वैज्ञानिक कार्ययोजना
मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने कहा कि 11 करोड़ वृक्षारोपण के लक्ष्य को सफल बनाने के लिए केवल पौधे लगाना पर्याप्त नहीं होगा, बल्कि ग्राम स्तर पर सुनियोजित और वैज्ञानिक योजना बनाना भी जरूरी है। इसके लिए राज्य की प्रत्येक ग्राम पंचायत को अपने क्षेत्र में उपलब्ध सरकारी, सार्वजनिक और अन्य उपयुक्त भूमि का विस्तृत सर्वेक्षण कर उसका रिकॉर्ड तैयार करना होगा। इस जानकारी को केंद्र सरकार के निर्धारित पोर्टल पर अपलोड किया जाएगा, ताकि वृक्षारोपण अभियान का सटीक डेटा उपलब्ध रहे और उसकी नियमित निगरानी की जा सके।
मुख्यमंत्री ने बताया कि इस डिजिटल प्रक्रिया से पौधारोपण अधिक व्यवस्थित तरीके से होगा और प्रत्येक क्षेत्र की वास्तविक आवश्यकता के अनुसार योजना बनाई जा सकेगी। साथ ही, पोर्टल पर सही जानकारी दर्ज होने से केंद्र सरकार की विभिन्न पर्यावरण और हरित विकास योजनाओं के तहत मिलने वाली आर्थिक सहायता प्राप्त करने में भी सुविधा होगी। इससे ग्राम पंचायतों को अतिरिक्त संसाधन मिलेंगे और अभियान को दीर्घकालिक सफलता मिलेगी।
यह भी पढ़ेः-  महाराष्ट्र में इंफ्रास्ट्रक्चर को बढ़ावा; सड़क, पुल और पीएम आवास योजनाओं को प्राथमिकता, सरकार ने बढ़ाया फंड 
तकनीक और सार्वजनिक-निजी भागीदारी
वृक्षारोपण की निगरानी के लिए अब उपग्रह तकनीक, ड्रोन और जीआईएस (जीआईएस) प्रणाली का उपयोग किया जाएगा। इससे रोपित पौधों की वृद्धि और स्थिति पर रियल-टाइम नज़र रखना संभव होगा। इसके अतिरिक्त, रोपों की उपलब्धता बढ़ाने के लिए निजी संस्थाओं और कृषि विश्वविद्यालयों के साथ भागीदारी की जाएगी।
 पीपीपी मॉडल के माध्यम से निजी रोपवाटिकाओं को जोड़कर वन विभाग केवल गुणवत्ता नियंत्रण पर ध्यान केंद्रित करेगा, जिससे हरित महाराष्ट्र का संकल्प समयबद्ध तरीके से पूरा हो सके।
